UserMgr.getIsSuperUser: Select IS_SUPER_USER from USERS where USER_ID = ?
UserMgr.updateUserGroup: UPDATE user_group set GROUP_NAME =?, GROUP_ID =?, USER_NAME =?, USER_HOME =?, PASSWORD =?, CREATED_BY =?, GROUP_MENU =?, CREATION_TIME =SYSDATE, EMAIL =?, PROJECT_ID =? where USER_ID =?
UserMgr.editBasicDateOfUserByGroup: UPDATE user_group set USER_NAME = ?,EMAIL =? where USER_ID =?
UserMgr.editPasswordOfUserByGroup: UPDATE user_group set PASSWORD =? where USER_ID =?
UserMgr.updateUser: UPDATE users SET PASSWORD = ?, EMAIL = ?, FULL_NAME=? WHERE USER_ID = ?
UserMgr.updatePasswordOfUser: UPDATE users SET PASSWORD = ? WHERE USER_ID = ?
UserMgr.updateBasicDataOfUser: UPDATE users SET USER_NAME = ?, EMAIL = ?, FULL_NAME=? , IS_SUPER_USER=?,USER_TYPE=?, CAN_SEND_EMAIL = ? WHERE USER_ID = ?
UserMgr.updateProjectUserGroup: update user_group set project_id = ? where user_id = ?
UserMgr.updateLastLogin: update TOTAL_TICKETS set last_login = SYSDATE where user_id = ?
UserMgr.getUsers: select * from users where user_name LIKE '%username%'

UserStoreMgr.deleteOldPrivileges: delete from user_prev where id in ( select u.id from user_prev u ,previliges p where u.store_code=p.prev_code and u.user_id =? and p.type=? )
UserStoreMgr.deleteOldGroupPrivileges: delete from group_prev where id in ( select g.id from group_prev g ,previliges p where g.store_code=p.prev_code and g.group_id =? and p.type=? )
UserStoreMgr.getUserPrivilegeCodes: SELECT store_code FROM user_prev WHERE user_id = ?
UserStoreMgr.getGroupPrivilegeCodes: SELECT store_code FROM group_prev WHERE group_id = ?
UserStoreMgr.deleteUserStoresByBranches: DELETE FROM USER_PREV WHERE USER_ID = ? AND STORE_CODE IN (SELECT ITEM_FORM_LIST.STORE_CODE FROM ITEM_FORM_LIST WHERE BRANCH_CODE IN (bbb))
UserStoreMgr.getUserPrevliges: select * from user_prev where user_id=? and prev_type=?
UserStoreMgr.getGroupPrevliges: select * from group_prev where group_id=? and prev_type=?

EqpEventLogMgr.getLastActionReading: select LAST_ACTION_TOTAL_READING from eqp_event_log where ENTRY_DATE=(select max(ENTRY_DATE) from eqp_event_log)and unit_id= ?

UserGroupMgr.updateUserGroup: UPDATE user_group SET GROUP_MENU=? WHERE GROUP_ID=?
UserGroupMgr.selectLoginUser: select * from user_group where GROUP_ID =? and PASSWORD =? and USER_NAME =?

GroupMgr.updateTrackerGroup: UPDATE tracker_group SET GROUP_DESC=?, GROUP_MENU=?, GROUP_NAME=?, DEFAULT_PAGE=? WHERE GROUP_ID = ?

BookmarkMgr.selectBookmark: SELECT * FROM bookmark WHERE USER_ID = ? AND ISSUE_ID = ?
BookmarkMgr.getAllBookmark: SELECT B.*, U.FULL_NAME USER_NAME FROM BOOKMARK B LEFT JOIN USERS U ON B.USER_ID = U.USER_ID

AssignedIssueMgr.updateAssignedIssue: UPDATE issue SET CURRENT_STATUS=?, CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE = SYSDATE, ASSIGNED_BY_ID=?, ASSIGNED_BY_NAME=?, ASSIGNED_TO_ID= ? , ASSIGNED_TO_NAME= ? , TECHNICIAN_NAME = ? , FINISHED_TIME=?, ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE= ? WHERE ID=?
AssignedIssueMgr.updateAssignedIssueStatus: UPDATE issue_status SET END_DATE = SYSDATE,TOTAL_TIME = ? WHERE END_DATE = ? AND ISSUE_ID = ?
AssignedIssueMgr.getEndDateForIssue: SELECT END_DATE FROM ISSUE_STATUS WHERE ISSUE_ID = ?
AssignedIssueMgr.updateJobOrder: UPDATE issue SET WORK_ORDER_TRADE=?, SHIFT=? ,ESTIMATED_DURATION=?, ISSUE_DESC=? WHERE ID=?

MaintainableUnitType.updatemaintainableunittype: update MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE set TYPE_NAME= ? , NOTES= ? , EN_ABBREVIATION= ?, IS_AGROUP_EQ= ?,IS_NOT_STANDALONE = ?,BASIC_COUNTER = ? WHERE ID= ?

DepartmentMgr.updateDepartment: UPDATE department SET DEPARTMENT_NAME = ?, DEPARTMENT_DESC = ? WHERE DEPARTMENT_ID = ?

WFTaskMgr.insertUpdateInTask: UPDATE wf_task SET CURRENT_STATUS= ? , REVIEW_BY_ID= ? , REVIEW_TO_ID= ? , UPDATE_ID = ? , LAST_VISIT_DATE = SYSDATE , USER_TYPE = ? WHERE ID= ?
WFTaskMgr.updateTask: UPDATE WF_TASK SET TITLE = ?, NOTES = ?, CREATED_BY = ?, CREATION_DATE = ?, TASK_TYPE = ?, DEPARTMENT = ? WHERE ID = ?
WFTaskMgr.getTicketComponent: select ID,"NAME" FROM DOWNLOAD_COMPONENT WHERE ID IN ( select COMPONENT_ID FROM BUSINESS_OBJ_COMPONENT WHERE business_obj_id=? )

IssueMgr.getCallRatioo: select connection_type, count(connection_type) connection_count from (select (case when call_type = 'incoming' and issue_desc = 'call' then 'Inbound Call' when call_type = 'out_call' and issue_desc = 'call' then 'Outbound Call' when call_type = 'incoming' and issue_desc = 'internet' then 'Inbound Internet' when call_type = 'incoming' and issue_desc = 'meeting' then 'Inbound Visit' when call_type = 'out_call' and issue_desc = 'meeting' then 'Outbound Visit' end) as connection_type from issue where issue_desc != 'internal' whereUserID) GROUP BY connection_type
IssueMgr.getRequestRatioo: SELECT type_name, COUNT(type_name) AS request_count FROM issue_by_complaint where department_name=? GROUP BY type_name ORDER BY type_name ASC
IssueMgr.getCallDate: select * from issue where urgency_id=? order by creation_time asc
IssueMgr.insertIssue: INSERT INTO issue VALUES (?,?,?,?,'Emergency',?,?,?,?,?,?,?,SYSDATE,'Schedule',SYSDATE,'UL','UL','UL','UL',Null,0,?,?,0,?,0,0,0,0,?,issue_number.nextval,'NONE', NULL,NULL,?,?, SYSDATE,?)
IssueMgr.updateIssue: UPDATE issue SET PROJECT_NAME = ?, FA_ID = ?, ISSUE_TYPE = ?, USER_ID = ?, URGENCY_ID = ?, EXPECTED_B_DATE = ?, EXPECTED_E_DATE = ?, CREATION_TIME = SYSDATE, IS_RISK = ? WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.updateOrderIssue: UPDATE ISSUE SET RECEIVED_BY = ?, WORK_ORDER_TRADE = ?, URGENCY_ID= ?, REPAIR_TYPE = ? , ESTIMATED_DURATION = ?, ISSUE_DESC = ?, SHIFT = ? WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.updateUnitSchedule: update UNIT_SCHEDULE set UNIT_ID= ?, UNIT_NAME= ? where ID= ?
IssueMgr.getdelayed: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE CURRENT_STATUS !='Finished' and EXPECTED_E_DATE < SYSDATE
IssueMgr.updateIssueDeviation: UPDATE issue SET CURRENT_STATUS=? ,ACTUAL_FINISH_TIME =?, END_DEVIATION = ?, BEGIN_DEVIATION = ?, ESTIMATED_DEVIATION = ?, ACTUAL_END_DATE = ? WHERE ID=?
IssueMgr.updateIssueDeviationOnholdCancel: UPDATE issue SET CURRENT_STATUS=? ,ACTUAL_FINISH_TIME =?, END_DEVIATION = ?, BEGIN_DEVIATION = ?, ESTIMATED_DEVIATION = ? WHERE ID=?
IssueMgr.updateIssueActualCost: UPDATE issue SET ACTUAL_COST =? WHERE ID=?
IssueMgr.updateIssueStatusDate: UPDATE issue_status SET END_DATE = SYSDATE,TOTAL_TIME = ? WHERE END_DATE = TO_DATE('31-Dec-2010','DD-MON-YYYY') AND ISSUE_ID = ?
IssueMgr.updateIssueStatusDateVirtualDate: UPDATE issue_status SET END_DATE = SYSDATE,TOTAL_TIME = ? WHERE END_DATE = ? AND ISSUE_ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueTotal: SELECT CURRENT_STATUS, count(CURRENT_STATUS) AS TOTAL FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? GROUP BY CURRENT_STATUS
IssueMgr.selectIssueAllTotal: SELECT CURRENT_STATUS, count(CURRENT_STATUS) AS TOTAL FROM issue WHERE current_status IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CURRENT_STATUS
IssueMgr.getIssueNumbers: SELECT COUNT(ID) AS total FROM issue WHERE UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueRisk: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND IS_RISK = 'Yes'
IssueMgr.selectIssueStatusForProject: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND CREATION_TIME BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY CURRENT_STATUS, ISSUE_TITLE
IssueMgr.selectIssueProjectByWorker: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE ASSIGNED_TO_ID = ? AND PROJECT_NAME =?
IssueMgr.selectIssueProjectByMaintenance: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE FA_ID = ? AND PROJECT_NAME =? ORDER BY EXPECTED_E_DATE
IssueMgr.selectIssueProjectWorkerStatus: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND ASSIGNED_TO_ID = ? AND EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY CURRENT_STATUS, ISSUE_TITLE
IssueMgr.selectIssueAllHours: SELECT SUM(ACTUAL_FINISH_TIME) AS total, ASSIGNED_TO_NAME, PROJECT_NAME FROM issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY ASSIGNED_TO_NAME, PROJECT_NAME
IssueMgr.selectIssueHours: SELECT SUM(ACTUAL_FINISH_TIME) AS total, ASSIGNED_TO_NAME, PROJECT_NAME FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY ASSIGNED_TO_NAME, PROJECT_NAME
IssueMgr.insertIssueSchedule: INSERT INTO issue VALUES (?,?,?,'UL',?,?,?,?,'0',?,?,'1',SYSDATE,'Schedule',SYSDATE,'UL','UL','UL','UL',Null,'0',?,?,0,0,0,0,0,0,?,issue_number.nextval,'NONE', NULL, NULL, NULL,?, SYSDATE,?,'1')
IssueMgr.updateIssueUnitSchedule: UPDATE unit_schedule SET CONFIGURE ='Yes' WHERE ID=?
IssueMgr.updateConfigUnitSchedule: UPDATE unit_schedule SET CONFIGURE ='No' WHERE ID=?
IssueMgr.selectIssueByWorker: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE ASSIGNED_TO_ID = ? AND CURRENT_STATUS = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueSearchByTitle: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE ISSUE_TITLE LIKE '%$%' and WORK_ORDER_TRADE in (select trade_id from user_trade where user_id = ?)
IssueMgr.selectIssueSearchByNote: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE ISSUE_DESC LIKE '%$%' and WORK_ORDER_TRADE in (select trade_id from user_trade where user_id = ?)
IssueMgr.getSearchByShift: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE FA_ID = ? AND WORK_ORDER_TRADE in (select trade_id from user_trade where user_id = ?)
IssueMgr.getSearchByDepartment: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE RECEIVED_BY = ? AND WORK_ORDER_TRADE in (select trade_id from user_trade where user_id = ?) and issue.CREATION_TIME between ? and ?
IssueMgr.selectUnitSchedule: SELECT UNIT_NAME FROM unit_schedule WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueUnitSchedule: SELECT UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID FROM issue WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectUnitScheduleMaintenance: SELECT MAINTENANCE_TITLE FROM unit_schedule WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.getUnitScheduleDates: select min(begin_date) as beginDate , max(end_date) as endDate , min(configure) as isConfigured from UNIT_SCHEDULE where unit_id = ? and periodic_id = ?
IssueMgr.getUnitScheduleDate: select distinct(begin_date) from unit_schedule where unit_id = ? and begin_date between ? and ?
IssueMgr.selectUnitScheduleConfigure: SELECT CONFIGURE FROM unit_schedule WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueUser: SELECT USER_NAME FROM users WHERE USER_ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueMaintainableUnit: SELECT ID FROM maintainable_unit WHERE UNIT_NAME = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueScheduleMaintenance: SELECT ID FROM schedule WHERE MAINTENANCE_TITLE = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssueInRange: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and CURRENT_STATUS!='Canceled' and CURRENT_STATUS!='Removed'
IssueMgr.getIssuesListInRangeByEmg: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and CURRENT_STATUS!='Canceled' and CURRENT_STATUS!='Removed' and ISSUE_TITLE='Emergency' and PROJECT_NAME in (projs)
IssueMgr.getIssuesListInRangeBySch: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and CURRENT_STATUS!='Canceled' and CURRENT_STATUS!='Removed' and ISSUE_TITLE !='Emergency' and PROJECT_NAME in (projs)
IssueMgr.selectEqIssueInRange: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND UNIT_ID = ?
IssueMgr.getScheduleIssuesInRange: SELECT * FROM issue, unit_schedule WHERE unit_schedule.id = issue.unit_schedule_id AND unit_schedule.unit_id = ? AND unit_schedule.periodic_id = ? AND issue.expected_b_date BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY issue.expected_b_date
IssueMgr.selectTechName: SELECT DEPARTMENT_NAME FROM DEPARTMENT WHERE DEPARTMENT_ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectFailureTitle: SELECT TITLE FROM failure_code WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectUrgencyLevel: SELECT URGNECY_NAME FROM urgency WHERE URGENCY_ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectSiteName: SELECT PROJECT_NAME FROM project WHERE PROJECT_ID = ?
IssueMgr.getNumberSchedule: SELECT COUNT(PERIODIC_ID) AS total FROM unit_schedule WHERE PERIODIC_ID = ?
IssueMgr.insertHourlyScheduleIssue: INSERT INTO issue VALUES (?,?,?,'Schedule',?,?,'1','Hourly Schedule',?,?,?,'1',SYSDATE,'Schedule',SYSDATE,'UL','UL','UL','UL',Null,0,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'DD-MON-YYYY'),TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'DD-MON-YYYY'),0,0,0,0,0,0,?,issue_number.nextval,'NONE', NULL, NULL, NULL,?, SYSDATE,?,'1')
IssueMgr.getEquipName: SELECT UNIT_NAME FROM maintainable_unit WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.updateTotalCost: UPDATE issue SET TOTAL_COST =? WHERE UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID=?
IssueMgr.updateJobIssueDate: UPDATE issue SET EXPECTED_B_DATE = ?, EXPECTED_E_DATE = ? WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.getScheduleCase: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE ID =? AND CURRENT_STATUS='Schedule'
IssueMgr.updateJobOrder: UPDATE issue SET RECEIVED_BY = ?, WORK_ORDER_TRADE = ?, FAILURE_CODE = ?, ESTIMATED_DURATION = ?, URGENCY_ID = ?, ISSUE_DESC = ?, USER_GROUP_ID =?, USER_TRADE_ID = ? WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectFailureCodeAllIssue: SELECT COUNT (*) AS total, failure_code.title FROM issue INNER JOIN failure_code ON issue.failure_code = failure_code.ID WHERE (issue.expected_b_date >= ?) AND (issue.expected_b_date <= ?) GROUP BY failure_code.title
IssueMgr.selectFailureCodeEmergencyIssue: SELECT COUNT (*) AS total, failure_code.title FROM issue INNER JOIN failure_code ON issue.failure_code = failure_code.ID WHERE (issue.expected_b_date >= ?) AND (issue.expected_b_date <= ?) AND (issue.issue_type = 'Emergency') GROUP BY failure_code.title
IssueMgr.selectFailureCodeExternalIssue: SELECT COUNT (*) AS total, failure_code.title FROM issue INNER JOIN failure_code ON issue.failure_code = failure_code.ID WHERE (issue.expected_b_date >= ?) AND (issue.expected_b_date <= ?) AND (issue.issue_type = 'External') GROUP BY failure_code.title
IssueMgr.getCreateTimeAssigned: SELECT EXPECTED_B_DATE FROM issue WHERE ID =?
IssueMgr.getNotesAssigned: SELECT STATUS_NOTE FROM issue_status WHERE ISSUE_ID =? AND STATUS_NAME ='Assigned'
IssueMgr.getUpdateCaseConfigEmg: UPDATE UNIT_SCHEDULE SET CONFIGURE = 'Yes' WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.getsitDate: select TO_CHAR(SITE_ENTRY_DATE,'Month DD, YYYY HH:MI:SS am') from issue where id=?
IssueMgr.getActualBeginDate: select TO_CHAR(ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE,'Month DD, YYYY HH:MI:SS am') from issue where id=?
IssueMgr.getActualBeginDateFormat: select TO_CHAR(ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:MI:SS') from issue where id=?
IssueMgr.getEndJobDate: select TO_CHAR(ACTUAL_END_DATE,'Month DD, YYYY HH:MI:SS am') from issue where id=?
IssueMgr.updateStateByUnit: update equip_status set END_DATE = ? where EQUIPMENT_ID=? and STATE_ID='1' and END_DATE is null
IssueMgr.getJobOrderByBusinessIdAndBusinessByDate: SELECT ID FROM issue WHERE BUSINESS_ID = ? AND BUSINESS_ID_BY_DATE = ?
IssueMgr.getIssuesByMinMaxIds: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE ID BETWEEN ? AND ?
IssueMgr.selectExpectedBeginDate: SELECT TO_CHAR(EXPECTED_B_DATE ,'Month" "DD", "YYYY') AS expectedBeginDate FROM ISSUE WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectExpectedEndDate: SELECT TO_CHAR(EXPECTED_E_DATE ,'Month" "DD", "YYYY') AS expectedEndDate FROM ISSUE WHERE ID = ?
IssueMgr.selectIssuPartsCost: SELECT SUM(I.TOTAL_COST) IssuePartsCost FROM ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE_ITEM_DATA I WHERE I.SCHEDULE_ID = (SELECT J.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID FROM ISSUE J WHERE J.ID = ? )
IssueMgr.getNumberOfAllIssue: SELECT COUNT(ISSUE.ID) AS NUMBER_OF_ALL_ISSUE FROM ISSUE
IssueMgr.getIssueCountPerProject: SELECT project.project_name, COUNT(issue.id) AS issue_count FROM issue, project where issue.project_name = project.project_id GROUP BY project.project_name ORDER BY project.project_name ASC

IssueTypeMgr.updateIssueType: UPDATE issue_type SET TYPE_DESC = ? WHERE TYPE_NAME = ?

IssueStatusMgr.selectIssueStatusBeginDate: select STATUS_ID, STATUS_NAME, ISSUE_ID, ISSUE_TITLE, STATUS_NOTE, to_char(END_DATE,'yyyy-dd-mm hh24:mi:ss am') AS END_DATE, to_char(BEGIN_DATE,'yyyy-dd-mm hh24:mi:ss am') AS BEGIN_DATE, TOTAL_TIME, CAUSE_DESCRIPTION, ACTION_TAKEN FROM issue_status WHERE ISSUE_ID = ? ORDER BY to_number(STATUS_ID) asc
IssueStatusMgr.selectIssueStatusEndDate: select STATUS_ID, STATUS_NAME, ISSUE_ID, ISSUE_TITLE, STATUS_NOTE, to_char(END_DATE,'yyyy-dd-mm hh24:mi:ss am') AS END_DATE, to_char(BEGIN_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss am') AS BEGIN_DATE, TOTAL_TIME, CAUSE_DESCRIPTION, ACTION_TAKEN FROM issue_status WHERE ISSUE_ID = ? and END_DATE = ?
IssueStatusMgr.selectFinishIssue: select * from issue_status where STATUS_NAME = 'Finished' and issue_id = ?

MaintenanceMgr.updateMaintenanceType: UPDATE maintenance_type SET MAINTENANCE_DESC = ? WHERE MAINTENANCE_NAME = ?

MilestoneMgr.updateMilestone: UPDATE milestone SET MILESTONE_DESCRIPTION = ? WHERE MILESTONE_ID = ?

PlaceMgr.updatePlace: UPDATE place SET PLACE_DESC = ? WHERE PLACE_ID = ?

ProjectMgr.updateProject: UPDATE project SET PROJECT_NAME = ?, EQ_NO = ?, PROJECT_DESCRIPTION = ? WHERE PROJECT_ID = ?
ProjectMgr.updateProjectMaintainableUnit: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET SITE =? WHERE SITE = ?
ProjectMgr.updateProjectIssue: UPDATE issue SET PROJECT_NAME =? WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ?
ProjectMgr.getSitesBySubName: select * from PROJECT where PROJECT_NAME LIKE '%ppp%'
ProjectMgr.getProjectNameByUnitId: SELECT PROJECT_NAME FROM PROJECT WHERE PROJECT_ID = (SELECT SITE FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE ID = ?)
ProjectMgr.getAllCompDeaprtments: SELECT * FROM PROJECT WHERE MAIN_PROJ_ID = (SELECT PROJECT_ID FROM PROJECT WHERE EQ_NO LIKE '%ppp%')

UrgencyMgr.updateUrgency: UPDATE urgency SET URGNECY_DESC = ? WHERE URGNECY_NAME = ?
UrgencyMgr.getUrgencyId: SELECT URGENCY_ID FROM urgency WHERE URGNECY_NAME = ?

QMIssueInRange.selectStatusProjectListALL: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE CREATION_TIME BETWEEN ? AND ?
QMIssueInRange.selectNoStatus: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME =? AND CREATION_TIME BETWEEN ? AND ?

QMIssueStatus.selectIssueStatusProjectListALL: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND CURRENT_STATUS = ? AND EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ?
QMIssueStatus.selectIssueNoStatus: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND CURRENT_STATUS = ? AND EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ?

QMProjectStatus.selectProjectStatusProjectListALL: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ?
QMProjectStatus.selectProjectNoStatus: SELECT * FROM issue WHERE PROJECT_NAME = ? AND CREATION_TIME BETWEEN ? AND ?

CategoryMgr.updateCatSQL: UPDATE item_category SET CATEGORY_NAME = ?, CATEGORY_DSCRPTN = ? WHERE CATEGORY_ID = ?
CategoryMgr.getCategoryId: SELECT CATEGORY_ID FROM item_category WHERE CATEGORY_NAME = ?
CategoryMgr.selectAllCategory: SELECT UNIT_NAME FROM maintainable_unit where IS_MAINTAINABLE = '0'

SQL.ItemCatsMgr:
INSERT INTO quantified_mntence VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, SYSDATE,?,?)
INSERT INTO quantified_mntence VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, SYSDATE,?,'2',?,?,?)
INSERT INTO quantified_mntence VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, SYSDATE,?,?,?,?,?)
DELETE FROM mchn_item_categories WHERE EQUIPMENT_ID = ? AND CATEGORY_NAME = ?
INSERT INTO mchn_item_categories VALUES (?,?,?,?,?,?)
SELECT DISTINCT(CATEGORY_NAME) FROM mchn_item_categories WHERE EQUIPMENT_ID = ? .
SELECT * FROM mchn_item_categories
SELECT DISTINCT(CATEGORY_NAME) FROM mchn_item_categories

ItemMgr.updateItemSQL: UPDATE maintenance_item SET ITEM_CODE = ?, ITEM_UNIT = ?, ITEM_UNIT_PRICE = ?, ITEM_DSCRPTN = ?, CATEGORY_ID = ?, CATEGORY_NAME = ?, STORE_ID = ? WHERE ITEM_ID = ?
ItemMgr.getTotalItems: SELECT COUNT(ITEM_CODE) AS total FROM maintenance_item WHERE CATEGORY_ID = ?
ItemMgr.getCategoryId: SELECT CATEGORY_ID FROM item_category WHERE CATEGORY_NAME = ?
ItemMgr.selectItemsBySubNameByNotInItemCodeByIte: SELECT * FROM ITEMS WHERE ITEM_FORM = ? AND STORE_CODE = ? AND ITEM_DESC LIKE '%ppp%' AND ITEMCODE_BY_ITEMFORM NOT IN (ccc)
ItemMgr.selectItemsBySubCodeByNotInItemCodeByIte: SELECT * FROM ITEMS WHERE ITEM_FORM = ? AND STORE_CODE = ? AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ppp%' AND ITEMCODE_BY_ITEMFORM NOT IN (ccc)
ItemMgr.selectItemsBySubName: SELECT * FROM ITEMS WHERE ITEM_FORM = ? AND STORE_CODE = ? AND ITEM_DESC LIKE '%ppp%'
ItemMgr.selectItemsBySubCode: SELECT * FROM ITEMS WHERE ITEM_FORM = ? AND STORE_CODE = ? AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ppp%'

QuantifiedMntenceMgr.stItemSQL: SELECT ITEM_ID,ITEM_QUANNTITY,ITEM_PRICE, TOTAL_COST,BRANCH_ERP,STORE_ERP,IS_DIRECT_PRCH,ATTACHED_ON FROM quantified_mntence WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ? group by ITEM_ID,BRANCH_ERP,STORE_ERP,ITEM_QUANNTITY,ITEM_PRICE,TOTAL_COST,IS_DIRECT_PRCH,ATTACHED_ON order by ITEM_ID,ATTACHED_ON,ITEM_QUANNTITY
QuantifiedMntenceMgr.stSpecialItemSQL: SELECT * FROM quantified_mntence WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ? and IS_DIRECT_PRCH = ?
QuantifiedMntenceMgr.updateQuantityStatus: UPDATE quantified_mntence SET QUANTITY_STATUS = ? WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ? and IS_DIRECT_PRCH = ? AND ITEM_ID = ?
QuantifiedMntenceMgr.getQuantityStatusByItemID: SELECT QUANTITY_STATUS FROM quantified_mntence WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ? and IS_DIRECT_PRCH = ? AND ITEM_ID = ?
QuantifiedMntenceMgr.updateAlterPartForQuantified: UPDATE quantified_mntence SET ITEM_ID=? , ITEM_QUANNTITY=? ,ITEM_PRICE=?,TOTAL_COST=?,BRANCH_ERP=?,STORE_ERP=? where id=?

QuantMntenceCmplxMgr.stSpecialItemCmplxSQL: SELECT * FROM quanified_mntence_cmplx WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ? and IS_DIRECT_PRCH = ?

viewTableMgr.getTablesReleatedOnMainTypes: select MAINTENANCE_TITLE, TYPE_NAME from MAIN_TYPE_TABLES where SCHEDULED_ON=?
viewTableMgr.getTablesReleatedOnEquip: select MAINTENANCE_TITLE, UNIT_NAME from MAIN_TYPE_TABLES where SCHEDULED_ON=?

ScheduleMgr.getAllParentsSchedulesByName: select * from SCHEDULE where EQUIP_CAT_ID =(select PARENT_ID from MAINTAINABLE_UNIT where ID=?)
ScheduleMgr.getMainTypeScheduleBYUnitID: select * from SCHEDULE where MAIN_CAT_TYPE_ID =(select MAIN_TYPE_ID from MAINTAINABLE_UNIT where ID =?)
ScheduleMgr.AvailabilityOfMainTypeTables: select MAINTENANCE_TITLE from schedule where MAINTENANCE_TITLE = ? and MAIN_CAT_TYPE_ID=?
ScheduleMgr.AvailabilityOfEquipTables: select MAINTENANCE_TITLE from schedule where MAINTENANCE_TITLE = ? and EQUIP_ID=?
ScheduleMgr.getSchBySubName: select * from schedule where MAINTENANCE_TITLE LIKE '%ppp%'
ScheduleMgr.insertSchedule: INSERT INTO schedule VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, ?, '1', ?, SYSDATE, ?, NULL,'Cat',?,NULL,?,?)
ScheduleMgr.insertMainCatSchedule: INSERT INTO schedule VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, NULL, '1', ?, SYSDATE, ?, NULL,'mainCat',?,?,?,?)
ScheduleMgr.insertEquipScheduleKm: INSERT INTO schedule VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, '2', ?, SYSDATE, ?, NULL,'Eqp',?,NULL,?,0)
ScheduleMgr.insertEquipSchedule: INSERT INTO schedule VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, '1', ?, SYSDATE, ?, NULL,'Eqp',?,NULL,?,0)
ScheduleMgr.updateScheduleSQL: UPDATE schedule SET MAINTENANCE_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, FREQUENCY = ?, FREQUENCY_TYPE = ?, DURATION = ?, EQUIP_CAT_ID = ?, SCHEDULE_TRADE = ?, FREQUENCY_REAL = ?, WHICH_CLOSER = ? WHERE ID = ?
ScheduleMgr.updateEqpScheduleSQL: UPDATE schedule SET MAINTENANCE_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, FREQUENCY = ?, FREQUENCY_TYPE = ?, DURATION = ?, EQUIP_ID = ?, SCHEDULE_TRADE = ?, FREQUENCY_REAL = ?, WHICH_CLOSER = ? WHERE ID = ?
ScheduleMgr.updateMainCatScheduleSQL: UPDATE schedule SET MAINTENANCE_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, FREQUENCY = ?, FREQUENCY_TYPE = ?, DURATION = ?, MAIN_CAT_TYPE_ID = ?, SCHEDULE_TRADE = ?, FREQUENCY_REAL = ?, WHICH_CLOSER = ? WHERE ID = ?
ScheduleMgr.updateMainTypeSchedule: UPDATE schedule SET MAINTENANCE_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, FREQUENCY = ?, DURATION = ? WHERE ID = ?
ScheduleMgr.getScheduleByCategory: SELECT COUNT(EQUIP_CAT_ID) AS frequency, EQUIP_CAT_ID FROM SCHEDULE WHERE (SCHEDULED_ON='Cat') GROUP BY EQUIP_CAT_ID
ScheduleMgr.getScheduleByMainCat: SELECT COUNT(MAIN_CAT_TYPE_ID) AS frequency, MAIN_CAT_TYPE_ID FROM SCHEDULE WHERE (SCHEDULED_ON='mainCat') GROUP BY MAIN_CAT_TYPE_ID
ScheduleMgr.getScheduleByEquipment: SELECT COUNT(EQUIP_ID) AS frequency, EQUIP_ID FROM SCHEDULE WHERE (SCHEDULED_ON='Eqp') GROUP BY EQUIP_ID
ScheduleMgr.getScheduleForEquipment: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE WHERE SCHEDULED_ON='Eqp' ORDER BY ID DESC
ScheduleMgr.getAllScheduleByTimeOnEquipmentByDirectA: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE WHERE (EQUIP_ID = ? OR EQUIP_CAT_ID = ? OR MAIN_CAT_TYPE_ID = ? ) AND SCHEDULE_TYPE = '1'

TechMgr.updateTechSQL: UPDATE tchnican SET TECH_NAME = ?, JOB_TITLE = ? WHERE TECH_ID = ?

UnitScheduleMgr.getListEmergency: SELECT * FROM unit_schedule WHERE PERIODIC_ID = 1 and id in(select UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID from issue where WORK_ORDER_TRADE in (select trade_id from user_trade where user_id = ?))
UnitScheduleMgr.getUnitSchedules: SELECT * FROM unit_schedule WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND PERIODIC_ID = ? ORDER BY BEGIN_DATE
UnitScheduleMgr.getUnitBindSchedules: select distinct(unit_id), periodic_id, unit_name from (select distinct(periodic_id), unit_id, unit_name from UNIT_SCHEDULE) where periodic_id = ?
UnitScheduleMgr.getLastUnitScheduleSQL: select * from UNIT_SCHEDULE where end_date = (select max(end_date) from UNIT_SCHEDULE where periodic_id = ? and unit_id = ?)
UnitScheduleMgr.getUnitScheduleDates: select min(begin_date) as beginDate , max(end_date) as endDate , min(configure) as isConfigured from UNIT_SCHEDULE where unit_id = ? and periodic_id = ?
UnitScheduleMgr.getEqpSchedules: select distinct(periodic_id) from UNIT_SCHEDULE where unit_id =? and periodic_id !='1'
UnitScheduleMgr.getEquipmentDaySchedules: select * from unit_schedule where unit_id = ? and begin_date = ?
UnitScheduleMgr.isScheduleActive: select id from unit_schedule where periodic_id = ? and unit_id = ?
UnitScheduleMgr.getNumberIssues: SELECT COUNT(ID) AS NUMBER_ISSUES FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE
UnitScheduleMgr.getNumberIssuesByScheduleId: SELECT COUNT(ID) AS NUMBER_ISSUES FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE PERIODIC_ID = ?
UnitScheduleMgr.getNumberEmrgencyIssues: SELECT COUNT(ID) AS NUMBER_ISSUES FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE PERIODIC_ID = '1'
UnitScheduleMgr.getNumberNotEmrgencyIssues: SELECT COUNT(ID) AS NUMBER_ISSUES FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE PERIODIC_ID != '1'
UnitScheduleMgr.getSchedulesBeforeOrAfterDate: SELECT UNIT_ID,UNIT_NAME,PERIODIC_ID,MAINTENANCE_TITLE,MIN(BEGIN_DATE) AS BEGIN_DATE FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE PERIODIC_ID = ? and UNIT_ID = ? AND BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN SYSDATE - ? AND SYSDATE + ? GROUP BY UNIT_ID,UNIT_NAME,PERIODIC_ID,MAINTENANCE_TITLE
UnitScheduleMgr.getSchedulesBeforeOrAfterDateSchedules: SELECT UNIT_ID,UNIT_NAME,PERIODIC_ID,MAINTENANCE_TITLE,MIN(BEGIN_DATE) AS BEGIN_DATE FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE PERIODIC_ID = ? AND BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN SYSDATE - ? AND SYSDATE + ? GROUP BY UNIT_ID,UNIT_NAME,PERIODIC_ID,MAINTENANCE_TITLE
UnitScheduleMgr.getSchedulesBeforeOrAfterDateUnits: SELECT UNIT_ID,UNIT_NAME,PERIODIC_ID,MAINTENANCE_TITLE,MIN(BEGIN_DATE) AS BEGIN_DATE FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN SYSDATE - ? AND SYSDATE + ? GROUP BY UNIT_ID,UNIT_NAME,PERIODIC_ID,MAINTENANCE_TITLE
UnitScheduleMgr.getSchBySubNameAndScheduleOn: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE WHERE ID != '1' AND ID != '2' AND SCHEDULED_ON = ? AND MAINTENANCE_TITLE LIKE '%ppp%'
UnitScheduleMgr.getSchByScheduleOn: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE WHERE ID != '1' AND ID != '2' AND SCHEDULED_ON = ?
UnitScheduleMgr.getunitScheduleforDeserve: SELECT * FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND PERIODIC_ID = ? AND BEGIN_DATE = ?
UnitScheduleMgr.getEqpsByDueAfterDateSchedule: SELECT PERIODIC_ID, MAINTENANCE_TITLE, UNIT_ID, UNIT_NAME, MIN(BEGIN_DATE) AS BEGIN_DATE FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE PERIODIC_ID = ? AND BEGIN_DATE > ? GROUP BY PERIODIC_ID, MAINTENANCE_TITLE, UNIT_ID, UNIT_NAME ORDER BY PERIODIC_ID, BEGIN_DATE
UnitScheduleMgr.getSchNameBySubId: select MAINTENANCE_TITLE FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE ID = ?

DocImgMgr.getDocImageSQL: SELECT IMAGE FROM DOC_IMAGE WHERE IMAGE_ID = ?

DocTypeMgr.updateDocType: UPDATE doc_type SET TYPE_NAME = ?,DESCRIPTION= ? WHERE TYPE_ID = ?

FolderGroupMgr.selectFolderGroupSQL: SELECT * FROM FOLDER_GROUP WHERE FOLDER_ID = ? AND GROUP_ID = ?

ImageMgr.updateImageSQL: UPDATE document SET DOC_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, DOC_DATE = ?, CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ImageMgr.getImageSQL: SELECT IMAGE FROM document WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ImageMgr.getImageOnSingleKey: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,ISSUE_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM document WHERE DOC_ID = ? ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
ImageMgr.burnAudio: UPDATE document SET SOUND = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?

ImageMgr.getImageCntrDocsChildren: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,ISSUE_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM document ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
ImageMgr.getImageCntrDocsChildrenVector: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,ISSUE_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM document ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
ImageMgr.selectImageListOnSecondKey: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,ISSUE_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM document AND ACCOUNT = ? ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
ImageMgr.selectMaxCreationDateForSep: SELECT max(CREATION_TIME) as MAX_DATE FROM document WHERE PARENT_ID = '$'
ImageMgr.setObsolete: UPDATE document SET IS_OBSOLETE = 'TRUE' WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ImageMgr.selectImageIsUnique: SELECT DOC_ID FROM document WHERE DOC_TITLE = ? ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
ImageMgr.updateFolder: UPDATE document SET DOC_TITLE = ?,DESCRIPTION= ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ImageMgr.moveSeparator: UPDATE document SET PARENT_ID = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ImageMgr.updateImageDocuments: UPDATE document SET ACCOUNT = ?, ACC_ITEM_SURROGATE = ? WHERE PARENT_ID= ?
ImageMgr.makeBaseline: UPDATE document SET IS_LAST_BASELINE = 'TRUE', IS_BASELINE = 'TRUE', VERSION_NUMBER = ? WHERE DOC_ID= ?
ImageMgr.clearBaseline: UPDATE document SET IS_LAST_BASELINE = 'FALSE' WHERE PARENT_ID= ?
ImageMgr.checkBaseline: SELECT DOC_ID FROM document WHERE IS_BASELINE = 'TRUE'AND IS_HIDDEN = 'FALSE' AND PARENT_ID = ?
ImageMgr.allowShowAllBaseline: UPDATE document SET IS_HIDDEN = ? WHERE PARENT_ID = ? AND IS_BASELINE = ?
ImageMgr.sepAllBaseline: UPDATE document SET IS_HIDDEN = ? , DISPLAY_STATUS = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ImageMgr.clearImageDocuments: UPDATE document SET IS_HIDDEN = 'FALSE' WHERE PARENT_ID= ?
ImageMgr.showOnlyLastBaseline: UPDATE document SET IS_HIDDEN = ? WHERE PARENT_ID = ? AND IS_LAST_BASELINE = ?
ImageMgr.sepOnlyLastBaseline: UPDATE document SET IS_HIDDEN = ? , DISPLAY_STATUS = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ImageMgr.clearImageSeparator: UPDATE document SET IS_HIDDEN = 'FALSE' , DISPLAY_STATUS = 'NONE' WHERE DOC_ID= ?
ImageMgr.lockImageDocument: UPDATE document SET IS_LOCKED = 'TRUE' WHERE DOC_ID ='$'
ImageMgr.unlockImageDocument: UPDATE document SET IS_LOCKED = 'FALSE' WHERE DOC_ID ='$'
ImageMgr.updateImageSeparator: UPDATE document SET VERSION_NUMBER = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?

InfluenceMgr.getOnCompoundKey: SELECT INFLUENCE_ID,INFLUENCED_ID,INFLUENCE_TYPE,TRACEABILITY_TYPE,GROUP_NAME,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,INFLUENCE_TITLE,INFLUENCED_TITLE,CREATION_TIME FROM INFLUENCE WHERE INFLUENCE_ID = ? AND INFLUENCED_ID = ?

InstMgr.updateInstSQL: UPDATE instructions SET INST_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, INST_DATE = ?, CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = ? WHERE INST_ID = ?
InstMgr.getInstSQL: SELECT IMAGE FROM instructions WHERE INST_ID = ?
InstMgr.getInstOnSingleKey: SELECT INST_ID,INST_TITLE,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,DESCRIPTION,INST_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM instructions WHERE INST_ID = ? ORDER BY CREATION_TIME

LockMgr.selectLockSQL: SELECT * FROM LOCKED WHERE USER_ID = ? AND DOC_ID = ?

SupplierMgr.updateSupplier: UPDATE supplier SET SUPPLIER_NO = ?, NAME = ?, DESIGNATION = ?, ADDRESS = ?, CITY = ?, PHONE = ?, FAX = ?, EMAIL = ?, SERVICE = ?, IS_ACTIVE = ?, NOTE = ? WHERE ID = ?
SupplierMgr.selectAllSuppliersSQL: SELECT SUPPLIER.* FROM SUPPLIER WHERE (SUPPLIER.ID in (select supplier_ID from EQUIPMENT_SUPPLIERS where EQUIPMENT_SUPPLIERS.EQUIPMENT_ID = ?))

ClientMgr.updateClient: UPDATE client SET CLIENT_NO = ?, NAME = ?, DESIGNATION = ?, ADDRESS = ?, CITY = ?, PHONE = ?, FAX = ?, EMAIL = ?, SERVICE = ?, IS_ACTIVE = ?, NOTE = ? WHERE ID = ?
ClientMgr.selectAllSuppliersSQL: SELECT SUPPLIER.* FROM SUPPLIER WHERE (SUPPLIER.ID in (select supplier_ID from EQUIPMENT_SUPPLIERS where EQUIPMENT_SUPPLIERS.EQUIPMENT_ID = ?))
ClientMgr.selectClientAppointment: select distinct c.* from CLIENT c , APPOINTMENT a where c.SYS_ID=a.CLIENT_ID and to_char(a.APPOINTMENT_DATE,'YYYY')=?

WFTaskDocMgr.getWfTaskDocImage: SELECT IMAGE FROM WF_TASK_DOC WHERE DOC_ID = ?
WFTaskDocMgr.selectWFTaskDocOnSingleKey: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,TASK_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM WF_TASK_DOC WHERE DOC_ID = ? ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
WFTaskDocMgr.updateWFTaskDocImage: UPDATE WF_TASK_DOC SET DOC_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, DOC_DATE = ?, CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?

UnitDocMgr.selectFirstPdfDocument: SELECT DOC_ID FROM mntnble_unit_doc WHERE DOC_TYPE='pdf' AND UNIT_ID = ? AND ROWNUM =1
UnitDocMgr.getUnitDocsByDocType: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,UNIT_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM mntnble_unit_doc WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = ? AND DOC_ID = ?
UnitDocMgr.getUnitDocImage: SELECT IMAGE FROM mntnble_unit_doc WHERE DOC_ID = ?
UnitDocMgr.selectUnitDocOnSingleKey: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,UNIT_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM mntnble_unit_doc WHERE DOC_ID = ? ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
UnitDocMgr.updateUnitDocImage: UPDATE mntnble_unit_doc SET DOC_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, DOC_DATE = ?, CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
UnitDocMgr.updateDocumentParent: UPDATE mntnble_unit_doc SET unit_id = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
UnitDocMgr.updateSelectedFileParent: UPDATE mntnble_unit_doc SET unit_id = ? where doc_id in (ppp)
UnitDocMgr.selectUnitDocHasImage: Select DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,UNIT_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_TYPE,CREATION_TIME,DOC_META_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE from mntnble_unit_doc where UNIT_ID = $ AND DOC_META_TYPE = 'image'
UnitDocMgr.selectUnitDocHasDocumentByType: Select DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,UNIT_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_TYPE,CREATION_TIME from mntnble_unit_doc where UNIT_ID = $ and type=?
UnitDocMgr.getUnitDocs: SELECT doc_id, doc_title, unit_id, description, doc_date, config_item_type, doc_type FROM mntnble_unit_doc WHERE config_item_type=? AND (doc_date between to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') and to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY')) order by doc_date
UnitDocMgr.getUnitDocsByDates: SELECT doc_id, doc_title, unit_id, description, doc_date, config_item_type, doc_type FROM mntnble_unit_doc WHERE doc_date between to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') and to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') order by doc_date
UnitDocMgr.deleteSelectedFile: delete FROM mntnble_unit_doc where doc_id in (ppp)
UnitDocMgr.selectCountDocsByUnitCode: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mntnble_unit_doc WHERE UNIT_ID =?
UnitDocMgr.getLogosWithProjectID: SELECT MD.doc_id, MD.doc_title, MD.unit_id, MD.description, MD.doc_date, MD.config_item_type, MD.doc_type FROM MNTNBLE_UNIT_DOC MD LEFT JOIN PROJECT P ON MD.UNIT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID RIGHT JOIN (SELECT * FROM DOC_TYPE WHERE TYPE_NAME = 'logo') DT ON MD.CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = DT.TYPE_ID WHERE P.PROJECT_ID = ?
UnitDocMgr.searchForDocuments: SELECT DOC_ID, DOC_TITLE, UNIT_ID, DESCRIPTION, DOC_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_BY_NAME, DOC_META_TYPE, DOC_TYPE, CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE, CREATION_TIME, TYPE FROM MNTNBLE_UNIT_DOC WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND DOC_TITLE LIKE ? AND TRUNC(CREATION_TIME) BETWEEN TO_DATE(?,'DD-MM-YY') AND TO_DATE(?,'DD-MM-YY')

MaintainableMgr.getAllParents: SELECT ID,UNIT_NO,UNIT_NAME,MAIN_TYPE_ID from maintainable_unit where PARENT_ID = 0
MaintainableMgr.getAllParentsBySubName: SELECT ID,UNIT_NO,UNIT_NAME,TYPE_OF_RATE,MAIN_TYPE_ID from maintainable_unit where PARENT_ID = 0 and UNIT_NAME LIKE '%PPP%'

MaintainableMgr.updateEquipmentMap: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET SERIAL_NO = ? WHERE ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.updateEquipmentOperation: update equipment_operation set OPERATION_TYPE = ?, AVERAGE = ? where EQUIPMENT_ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.updateMaintainableUnit: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET PARENT_ID = ?, UNIT_LEVEL = ?, UNIT_NO = ?, ENGINE_NUMBER = ?, MODEL_NO = ?, SERIAL_NO = ?, UNIT_NAME = ?, MANUFACTURER = ?, SITE = ?, DEPARTMENT = ?,PRODUCTION_LINE=?, STATUS = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, TYPE_OF_RATE = ?, TYPE_OF_OPERATION = ?, IS_STANDALONE = ?, MAIN_TYPE_ID = ? WHERE ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.updateMaintainableUnitManuf: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET MODEL_NO = ?, SERIAL_NO = ?, MANUFACTURER = ?, ENGINE_NUMBER = ? WHERE ID = ?

MaintainableMgr.getEqpsOutOfWorking2: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' and IS_DELETED = '0' and EQUIP_STATUS = '2' and STATUS_SINCE between ? and ?

MaintainableMgr.updateMaintainableUnitOperation: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET TYPE_OF_RATE = ?, TYPE_OF_OPERATION = ? WHERE ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.updateEqBasicData: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET PARENT_ID = ?, UNIT_LEVEL = ?, UNIT_NO = ?, ENGINE_NUMBER = ?, UNIT_NAME = ?, SITE = ?, DEPARTMENT = ?,PRODUCTION_LINE=?, STATUS = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, IS_STANDALONE = ? , SERVICE_ENTRY_DATE = ?, MAIN_TYPE_ID = ? , SERIAL_NO = ? , MANUFACTURER = ? WHERE ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.updateMaintainableUnitCat: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET UNIT_NAME = ?, MAIN_TYPE_ID = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, MANUFACTURER = ? WHERE ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.updateEquipmentSupplier: UPDATE supplier_equipment SET SUPPLIER_ID = ?, PURCHASE_DATE = ?, PURCHASE_PRICE = ?, CURRENT_VALUE = ?, DISPOSED_DATE = ?, CONTRACTOR_EMP_ID = ?, WARRANTY_CONTRACT = ?, WRNTY_EXPIRE_DATE = ?, NOTE = ? WHERE EQUIPMENT_ID = ?

MaintainableMgr.EquipmentChildren: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = ? and IS_DELETED = '0'
MaintainableMgr.selectRootNodesMaintainableUnit: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = '0' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME
MaintainableMgr.selectRootNodes: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = '0' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME
MaintainableMgr.selectMaintainableUnit: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = ? ORDER BY UNIT_NAME
MaintainableMgr.getAllParentSortingById: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = '0' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(ID) DESC
MaintainableMgr.setIsDeletedMaintainableUnit: UPDATE maintainable_unit SET UNIT_NO = ? ,IS_DELETED = '1' WHERE ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.getAllCategoryEquBySite: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE IS_MAINTAINABLE = '0' AND SITE=?
MaintainableMgr.getTotalEquipment: SELECT COUNT(UNIT_NAME) AS total FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = ? AND IS_DELETED = '0'

MaintainableMgr.getTotalAvgEquipmentByMainCat: SELECT COUNT(id) AS total FROM avg_unit WHERE MAIN_TYPE_ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.getTotalAvgEquipmentByBrand: SELECT COUNT(id) AS total FROM avg_unit_by_parent WHERE PARENT_ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.getAllEquipment: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = ? AND IS_DELETED = '0'
MaintainableMgr.getAllEqpsForMainCat: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' and IS_DELETED = '0' and MAIN_TYPE_ID= ? and PARENT_ID != '0'

MaintainableMgr.getParentName: SELECT unit_name FROM maintainable_unit WHERE ID = ?
MaintainableMgr.getUnitName: select UNIT_NAME from maintainable_unit where ID = ?

MaintainableMgr.getEqpStatueDateTime: select TO_CHAR(STATUS_SINCE,'Month DD, YYYY HH:MI:SS am') from MAINTAINABLE_UNIT where id=?

MaintainableMgr.getEquipBySiteAndTypeRateAndId: select id,unit_no,unit_name,site from maintainable_unit where id not in (xxx) and site in (yyy) and type_of_rate in (zzz) and IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' and IS_DELETED='0'
MaintainableMgr.getEquipmentsByIds: select id,unit_no,unit_name,site from maintainable_unit where id in (iii) and IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' and IS_DELETED='0'
MaintainableMgr.isMaintainableHasIssues: SELECT ID FROM UNIT_SCHEDULE WHERE UNIT_ID = ?

MaintainableMgr.getBrandsNumber: SELECT COUNT(ID) AS BRANDS_NUMBER FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE IS_DELETED = '0' AND IS_MAINTAINABLE = '0'
MaintainableMgr.getEquipmentsByInterval: SELECT ID, UNIT_NAME, INDICES FROM (SELECT ID, UNIT_NAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UNIT_NAME) AS INDICES FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE ID != '1' AND IS_DELETED = '0' AND IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1') WHERE INDICES BETWEEN ? AND ?
MaintainableMgr.getBrandsByInterval: SELECT ID, UNIT_NAME, INDICES FROM (SELECT ID, UNIT_NAME, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY UNIT_NAME) AS INDICES FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE IS_DELETED = '0' AND IS_MAINTAINABLE = '0') WHERE INDICES BETWEEN ? AND ?

MaintainableMgr.selectModelsByIds: select UNIT_NAME from MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE UNIT_NO in (iii) order by UNIT_NAME

MaintainableMgr.getTypeOfMainTypeNameById: SELECT BASIC_COUNTER FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE WHERE ID = ?

QueryMgr.selectListAllQuery: SELECT DOC_ID,PARENT_ID,DOC_TITLE,ACCOUNT,ACCNT_ITEM_NAME,DOC_DATE,DOC_META_TYPE,TOTAL,DOC_TYPE,STRUCTURE_TYPE,CREATED_BY,GROUP_NAME,IS_BASELINE,IS_LAST_BASELINE,IS_HIDDEN,DISPLAY_STATUS,SW_DOC_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,VERSION_NUMBER,MODIFIED_BY,REVIEWED_BY,APPROVED_BY,RELEASE_DATE,IS_LOCKED FROM document WHERE IS_HIDDEN = 'FALSE' ORDER BY CREATION_TIME

CrewMissionMgr.getTotalStaff: SELECT COUNT(distinct STAFF_CODE) AS total FROM crew_employee WHERE CREW_ID = ?

EmployeeMgr.insertEmpSQL: INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE (EMP_ID, EMP_NO, EMP_NAME, ADDRESS,HOME_PHONE,EMAIL,DEPARTMENT,HOURE_SALARY, NOTE, CREATION_TIME, CREATED_BY, GENDER, MARITAL_STATUS,EDUCATION, OPTION_1,SOCIAL_NUMBER,POSITION,WORK_START_DATE,MELATRY_STATUS, INSURANCE_NUMBER, BIRTH_DATE) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?,?,?,?,?, ?, SYSDATE, ?, ?, ?,?,?, ?,?,?,?,?,?)
EmployeeMgr.insertEmpStSQL: INSERT INTO ISSUE_STATUS VALUES (?, '72', 'UL', 'UL', NULL, SYSDATE, '0', 'UL', 'UL', 'UL', ?, 'EMPLOYEE', 'UL', ?)
EmployeeMgr.updateEmpSQL: Update EMPLOYEE set EMP_NAME = ?, ADDRESS = ?,HOME_PHONE = ?, EMAIL = ?, NOTE = ?, GENDER=? , MARITAL_STATUS = ? , OPTION_1 = ? where EMP_ID = ?
EmployeeMgr.saveEmpReq: INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE_REQUESTS VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? , ?, SYSDATE, ?, ?, NULL, NULL)
EmployeeMgr.saveEmpReqIssueStatus: INSERT INTO ISSUE_STATUS VALUES (?, '68', 'UL', 'UL', NULL, SYSDATE, '0', 'UL', 'UL', 'UL', ?, 'Employee Requests', 'UL', ?)
EmployeeMgr.saveEmpReqStatusIssueStatus: INSERT INTO ISSUE_STATUS VALUES (?, '69', 'UL', ?, NULL, SYSDATE, '0', 'UL', 'UL', 'UL', ?, 'Employee Requests', 'UL', ?)
EmployeeMgr.saveEmpReqStatusIssueRejStatus: INSERT INTO ISSUE_STATUS VALUES (?, '70', 'UL', ?, NULL, SYSDATE, '0', 'UL', 'UL', 'UL', ?, 'Employee Requests', 'UL', ?)
EmployeeMgr.saveEmpReqStatusIssueCancelStatus: INSERT INTO ISSUE_STATUS VALUES (?, '71', 'UL', ?, NULL, SYSDATE, '0', 'UL', 'UL', 'UL', ?, 'Employee Requests', 'UL', ?)
EmployeeMgr.getEmpSalConfig: Select EMP_SALARY_CONFIG.EXPENSE_ID,CODE,DESC_AR,DESC_EN, CONFIG_VALUE, CONFIG_PERSENTAGE,CONFIG_TYPE,EMP_SALARY_CONFIG.CREATION_TIME From EMP_SALARY_CONFIG inner join EXPENSE_ITEM on EMP_SALARY_CONFIG.EXPENSE_ID = EXPENSE_ITEM.ID where EMP_SALARY_CONFIG.EMP_ID = ?
EmployeeMgr.getEmpBsicSalary: select config_value from emp_salary_config inner join expense_item on emp_salary_config.expense_id = expense_item.id where expense_item.code = 1 and emp_id = ?
EmployeeMgr.updateEmployeeSQL: UPDATE employee SET EMP_NO = ?, EMP_NAME = ?, ADDRESS = ?, DESIGNATION = ?, WORK_PHONE = ?, EXTENSION = ?, HOME_PHONE = ?, FAX = ?, EMAIL = ?, DEPARTMENT = ?, HOURE_SALARY = ?, OVER_TIME1 = ?, OVER_TIME2 = ?, OVER_TIME3 = ?, IS_ACTIVE = ?, NOTE = ? WHERE EMP_ID = ?
EmployeeMgr.getAllEmployee: select emp.* ,iss.STATUS_NAME, iss.BEGIN_DATE, st.CASE_EN from employee emp left join issue_status iss on emp.EMP_ID = iss.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID left join status_type st on iss.STATUS_NAME = st.ID where iss.END_DATE is null
EmployeeMgr.filterEmployee: SELECT * FROM employee where EMP_NO like ?
EmployeeMgr.getEmployee: SELECT * FROM employee where EMP_ID not in (select CNFG_ID from FCLTY_CNFG where ASS_END_DATE is null)
EmployeeMgr.getDepID: SELECT DEPARTMENT_ID FROM department WHERE DEPARTMENT_NAME = ?
EmployeeMgr.getEmployeeId: SELECT EMP_ID FROM employee WHERE EMP_NAME = ?
EmployeeMgr.getEmployeeName: SELECT EMPNAME FROM empview WHERE EMPCODE = ?
EmployeeMgr.getManagerEmployees: SELECT E.*, EM.*, T.AR_TITLE TYPE_AR, T.EN_TITLE TYPE_EN FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE_TYPE T ON E.DESIGNATION = T.ID RIGHT JOIN EMPLOYEE_MANAGER EM ON E.EMP_ID = EM.EMPLOYEE_ID WHERE EM.MANAGER_ID = ?
EmployeeMgr.getAllManagers: SELECT distinct Manager.USER_ID , Manager.USER_NAME,count(Manager.USER_ID) as managerCount FROM USERS Manager INNER JOIN EMP_MGR ON Manager.USER_ID = EMP_MGR.MGR_ID group by Manager.USER_ID ,Manager.USER_NAME
EmployeeMgr.getMyEmployeeList: SELECT EMgr.* ,(SELECT FULL_NAME FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID=EMgr.EMP_ID) AS EMP_NAME FROM EMP_MGR EMgr WHERE EMgr.MGR_ID ='?' OR EMgr.EMP_ID='?'
EmployeeMgr.getEmployeeByManagerCode: SELECT USER_NAME FROM USERS INNER JOIN EMP_MGR ON USERS.USER_ID = EMP_MGR.EMP_ID WHERE MGR_ID = ?
EmployeeMgr.getManagerByEmployee: select * from users u INNER JOIN EMP_MGR e ON u.USER_ID = e.MGR_ID WHERE e.EMP_ID =?
EmployeeMgr.getAllMyEmployeesRequests: SELECT ER.*, U.FULL_NAME, P.PROJECT_NAME, ISS.STATUS_ID FROM EMPLOYEE_REQUESTS ER LEFT JOIN USERS U ON ER.EMP_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN PROJECT P ON ER.REQ_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS ISS ON ER.ID = ISS.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID WHERE ISS.STATUS_NAME = '68' AND ISS.END_DATE IS NULL AND ISS.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Employee Requests' AND TRUNC(ER.CREATION_TIME) BETWEEN TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
EmployeeMgr.getAllMyEmployeesRequestsByreqStatus: SELECT ER.*, U.FULL_NAME, P.PROJECT_NAME, ISS.STATUS_ID ,ST.CASE_AR,ST.CASE_EN ,ST.ID as STCODE FROM EMPLOYEE_REQUESTS ER LEFT JOIN USERS U ON ER.EMP_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN PROJECT P ON ER.REQ_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS ISS ON ER.ID = ISS.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID LEFT JOIN STATUS_TYPE ST ON ISS.STATUS_NAME = ST.ID WHERE ISS.END_DATE IS NULL AND ISS.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Employee Requests' AND TRUNC(ER.CREATION_TIME) BETWEEN TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
EmployeeMgr.getAllMyRequests: SELECT ER.*, EMP.EMP_NAME,U.FULL_NAME, P.PROJECT_NAME, ISS.STATUS_ID, ST.CASE_EN, ST.CASE_AR FROM EMPLOYEE_REQUESTS ER LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE EMP ON ER.EMP_ID =EMP.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN USERS U ON ER.CREATED_BY = U.USER_ID OR ER.EMP_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN PROJECT P ON ER.REQ_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS ISS ON ER.ID = ISS.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID LEFT JOIN STATUS_TYPE ST ON ISS.STATUS_NAME = ST.ID WHERE ISS.END_DATE IS NULL AND ISS.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Employee Requests' AND ER.EMP_ID = ? AND TRUNC(ER.CREATION_TIME) BETWEEN TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
EmployeeMgr.getAllEmployeesRequests: SELECT ER.*, U.FULL_NAME, P.PROJECT_NAME, ISS.STATUS_ID, ST.CASE_EN, ST.CASE_AR FROM EMPLOYEE_REQUESTS ER LEFT JOIN USERS U ON ER.EMP_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN PROJECT P ON ER.REQ_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE_STATUS ISS ON ER.ID = ISS.BUSINESS_OBJ_ID LEFT JOIN STATUS_TYPE ST ON ISS.STATUS_NAME = ST.ID WHERE ISS.OBJECT_TYPE = 'Employee Requests' AND ER.REQ_ID = ? AND TRUNC(ER.CREATION_TIME) BETWEEN TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(?, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
EmployeeMgr.upIssueStatus: UPDATE ISSUE_STATUS SET END_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE STATUS_ID = ?
EmployeeMgr.getEmployeeProfile: SELECT EE.ID, EE.DEPT_ID, EE.VACATIONS, EE.TEMP_VACATIONS, EE.TEMP_LEAVE, EE.WORKING_HOURS, EE.WORK_TYPE, EE.SALARY, DEP.DEPARTMENT_NAME FROM EMPLOYEE_PROFILE EE LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT DEP ON EE.DEPT_ID = DEP.DEPARTMENT_ID WHERE EMP_ID = ?

StoreMgr.addSpareTypesStore: INSERT INTO STORE_TYPE VALUES(?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, NULL, NULL)
StoreMgr.getNotSpareTypesStore: SELECT PRJ.PROJECT_ID, PRJ.PROJECT_NAME FROM PROJECT PRJ WHERE PRJ.LOCATION_TYPE = 'spare_type' AND PRJ.PROJECT_ID NOT IN (SELECT ST.TYP_ID FROM STORE_TYPE ST WHERE STR_ID = ?)
StoreMgr.getSpareTypesStore: SELECT PRJ.PROJECT_ID, PRJ.PROJECT_NAME FROM STORE_TYPE ST LEFT JOIN PROJECT PRJ ON ST.TYP_ID = PRJ.PROJECT_ID WHERE STR_ID = ?
StoreMgr.getAllSpareStore: SELECT PRJ.PROJECT_ID, PRJ.PROJECT_NAME, PRJ.OPTION_ONE FROM PROJECT PRJ WHERE PRJ.MAIN_PROJ_ID IN (SELECT ST.TYP_ID FROM STORE_TYPE ST WHERE ST.STR_ID = ?)

EquipmentStatusMgr.updateStatusEndDateSql: update EQUIP_STATUS set END_DATE = ? where end_date is null AND EQUIPMENT_ID = ?

IssueTasksCmplxMgr.updateIssueTasksCmplxSQL: update issue_tasks_cmplx set CODE_TASK = ?, DESC_EN = ?, DESC_AR = ? where ID = ?

DataBaseControl.getTaskName: select MAINTENANCE_TITLE from SCHEDULE WHERE ID= ?

IssueEquipmentMgr.getALLIssuesByTrade: SELECT * FROM issue_equipment WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND WORK_ORDER_TRADE in (select trade_id from user_trade where user_id =?)

IssueEquipmentMgr.selectIssueStatusEquipmentByFilter: SELECT * FROM issue_equipment WHERE PROJECT_NAME in ( ppp ) and UNIT_ID = ? AND CURRENT_STATUS = ? AND EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ?

TasksMgr.updateTasksSQL: UPDATE tasks SET TASK_NAME = ? , CREATED_BY = ? , CODE= ?, TRADE = ?, EXECUTION_HRS = ?, EMPLOYEE_TITLE= ?, TASK_TYPE= ?, TASK_TITLE=?, MAIN_TYPE_ID = ?, PARENT_UNIT = ?, ENG_DESC = ?, COST_HRS = ? WHERE ID = ?

TasksMgr.getTotalTasksByTrade: SELECT COUNT(TASK_TITLE) AS total FROM tasks WHERE TRADE = ?
TasksMgr.getTaskNameById: select TASK_NAME from TASKS WHERE ID = ?
TasksMgr.getTasksbyIssueId: select t.id,t.code,t.task_name,t.task_title from tasks t inner join issue_tasks it on t.id = it.code_task where it.issue_id = ?

ExternalJobMgr.updateExternalIssueSQL: update issue set SCHEDULE_TYPE = 'External' where ID = ?
ExternalJobMgr.updateExternal: UPDATE EXTERNAL_JOB SET SUPPLIER_ID = ? , CONVERSION_DATE = ? , REASON = ? , LABOR_COST = ? , MAINT_STATMENT = ? WHERE ISSUE_ID = ?

TaskExecutionMgr.deleteAllTaskExecutionSQL: delete from task_execution where ISSUE_TASK_ID in (select ID from issue_tasks where ISSUE_ID = ?)

EmpTasksHoursMgr.getTasksHoursByTasks: select * from emp_tasks_hours where task_id = ? and issue_id = ?

TradeMgr.getTradesByIds: SELECT Name FROM TRADE where ID in (iii)
TradeMgr.getTradesByType: select t.* ,(select count(*)from client where job=t.ID) clientCount from trade t where t.TRADE_TYPE=?

TransactionMgr.insertTransactionFirstStatusSQL: INSERT INTO TRANSACTION_STATUS VALUES (?,?,'Submitted',NULL,SYSDATE,' Status: Submitted')
TransactionMgr.selectTransactionInRange: SELECT * FROM TRANSACTION WHERE TRANS_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY TRANS_DATE
TransactionMgr.updateTransactionStatusSQL: UPDATE TRANSACTION SET CURRENT_STATUS = ?, CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE = SYSDATE WHERE ID = ?
TransactionMgr.updateTransactionStatusDateSQL: UPDATE TRANSACTION_STATUS SET END_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE TRANSACTION_NO = ? AND END_DATE IS NULL

ScheduleDocMgr.getScheduleDocImage: SELECT IMAGE FROM schedule_doc WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ScheduleDocMgr.selectScheduleDocOnSingleKey: SELECT DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,SCHEDULE_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_META_TYPE,DOC_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM schedule_doc WHERE DOC_ID = ? ORDER BY CREATION_TIME
ScheduleDocMgr.updateScheduleDocImage: UPDATE schedule_doc SET DOC_TITLE = ?, DESCRIPTION = ?, DOC_DATE = ?, CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = ? WHERE DOC_ID = ?
ScheduleDocMgr.selectScheduleDocHasImage: Select DOC_ID,DOC_TITLE,SCHEDULE_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOC_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOC_TYPE,CREATION_TIME,DOC_META_TYPE from schedule_doc where SCHEDULE_ID = $ AND DOC_META_TYPE = 'image'

ProductionLineMgr.getActiveProductionLineByIsDeleted: SELECT * FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE PRODUCTION_LINE = ? AND IS_DELETED = '0'

ItemsMgr.selectItemsCountSQL: SELECT ITEMS.ITEM_DESC, ITEMS.ITEM_CODE, SUM(EQP_MNTNC_TYPE_CONFIG.ITEM_QUANNTITY) AS ITEM_QUANNTITY FROM ISSUE INNER JOIN UNIT_SCHEDULE ON ISSUE.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = UNIT_SCHEDULE.ID RIGHT OUTER JOIN ITEMS INNER JOIN EQP_MNTNC_TYPE_CONFIG ON ITEMS.ITEM_CODE = EQP_MNTNC_TYPE_CONFIG.ITEM_ID ON UNIT_SCHEDULE.PERIODIC_ID = EQP_MNTNC_TYPE_CONFIG.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ISSUE.EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY ITEMS.ITEM_CODE, ITEMS.ITEM_DESC

EquipmentSuppliersMgr.selectSuppliersByEquipmentSQL: SELECT SUPPLIER.* FROM SUPPLIER WHERE (SUPPLIER.ID <> '1' AND SUPPLIER.ID not in (SELECT SUPPLIER_ID from EQUIPMENT_SUPPLIERS WHERE EQUIPMENT_SUPPLIERS.EQUIPMENT_ID = ?))
EquipmentSuppliersMgr.deleteEquipmentSupplierSQL: DELETE FROM equipment_suppliers WHERE EQUIPMENT_ID = ? AND SUPPLIER_ID = ?

ReadingRateUnitMgr.getAllReadingForEquipment: SELECT * FROM reading_rate_machine WHERE UNIT_ID = ? order by id desc

SupplementMgr.selectAttachedEquipmentSQL: select first ATTACHed_EQUIPMENT_ID from attached_eqps where MAIN_EQUIP_ID = ?

UnitMgr.selectEq: select UNIT_NAME,UNIT_NO,ID from maintainable_unit where IS_MAINTAINABLE='1' and IS_DELETED='0' and site = ?

ToolsMgr.getToolsBySubCode: select * from TOOLS where TOOL_CODE LIKE '%ppp%'

reports.getEqTasksInRangeByEMG: SELECT * FROM equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and PERIODIC_ID =1 order by unit_id

reports.getEquipByTypeOfRate: select * from maintainable_unit where IS_MAINTAINABLE='1' and IS_DELETED ='0' and TYPE_OF_RATE = ?

reports.getByCode: select * from ITEMS where ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ppp%'
reports.getTasksBySubName: select * from tasks where TASK_NAME LIKE '%ppp%'
reports.getTasksBySubCode: select * from tasks where CODE LIKE '%ppp%'

reports.getFtureTasksInRangeAndEquip: SELECT * FROM future_equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and unit_id=? order by unit_id
reports.getAllEqTasksInRange: SELECT * FROM equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? order by unit_id
reports.getEqTasksInRange: SELECT * FROM equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and PERIODIC_ID !='1' and current_status != 'Schedule' order by unit_id
reports.getCanceledJOrdersInRange: SELECT * FROM JOBORDER_CANCELED WHERE CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE BETWEEN ? AND ? order by unit_id
reports.getEqTasksInRangeAndEquip: SELECT * FROM equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and unit_id=? and PERIODIC_ID !='1' and current_status != 'Schedule'
reports.getEqTasksInRangeAndMainType: SELECT * FROM equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and main_type_id=? and PERIODIC_ID !='1' and current_status != 'Schedule'
reports.getEqTasksInRangeAndBrand: SELECT * FROM equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and parent_id=? and PERIODIC_ID !='1' and current_status != 'Schedule'
reports.getSparePartByName: select * from ITEMS where ITEM_DESC LIKE '%ppp%' AND ITEM_DESC IS NOT NULL
reports.getEquipBySubName: select * from maintainable_unit where IS_MAINTAINABLE='1' and IS_DELETED ='0' and UNIT_NAME LIKE '%ppp%' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME

reports.getEmployeeBySubName: select * from employee where EMP_NAME LIKE '%ppp%' AND EMP_NAME IS NOT NULL
reports.getByCode: select * from ITEMS where ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ppp%' AND ITEM_DESC IS NOT NULL
reports.getAllSpareParts: select * from ITEMS where ITEM_DESC IS NOT NULL
reports.getAllSparePartsByStoreCode: select ITEMCODE_BY_ITEMFORM,ITEM_DESC from ITEMS where store_code =? and ITEM_DESC IS NOT NULL
reports.getTasksBySubName: select * from tasks where TASK_NAME LIKE '%ppp%' AND TASK_NAME IS NOT NULL
reports.getFutureTasksInRange: SELECT * FROM future_equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? order by unit_id
reports.getFtureTasksInRangeAndEquip: SELECT * FROM future_equip_by_issue WHERE EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? and unit_id=? order by unit_id
reports.getAllEquipmentByAllMainType: select * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE IS_DELETED = '0' and PARENT_ID != '0' order by PARENT_ID
reports.getAllEquipmentByMainTypeId: select * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE MAIN_TYPE_ID =? and IS_DELETED = '0' AND IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' and PARENT_ID != '0' order by PARENT_ID
reports.getAllEquipmentByProjectId: select * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE SITE =? and IS_DELETED = '0' and PARENT_ID != '0' order by PARENT_ID
reports.getFixedAssetEqpBySubName: select * from fixed_machine where MACHINE_NAME like '%ppp%'
reports.getFixedAssetEqpByCode: select * from fixed_machine where MACHINE_NO like '%ppp%'
reports.getFixedAssetDataEqpBySubName: select * from fixed_assets_machine where asset_desc like '%ppp%'
reports.getFixedAssetDataEqpByCode: select * from fixed_assets_machine where asset_no like '%ppp%'
reports.getAllDayOfMonth: select * from tempday order by EXPECTED_B_DATE
reports.getScheduleByBasicTypeInRange: SELECT * FROM schedule_by_joborder WHERE main_type = ? and EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND status ='Schedule' order by schedule_id
reports.getScheduleByEquipmentInRange: SELECT * FROM schedule_by_joborder WHERE unit_id = ? and EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND status ='Schedule' order by schedule_id
reports.getScheduleByTypeInRange: SELECT * FROM schedule_by_joborder WHERE parent_id = ? and EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND status ='Schedule' order by schedule_id
reports.getScheduleByJOByTypeInRange: SELECT schedule_id FROM schedule_by_joborder WHERE parent_id = ? and EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND status ='Schedule' GROUP BY schedule_id ORDER BY schedule_id
reports.getJOByTypeAndScheduleInRange: SELECT * FROM schedule_by_joborder WHERE parent_id = ? and schedule_id = ? and EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND status ='Schedule' order by schedule_id
reports.getScheduleByProLineInRange: SELECT * FROM schedule_by_joborder WHERE pro_line = ? and EXPECTED_B_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND status ='Schedule' order by schedule_id
reports.getLastIssueByScheduleKM: SELECT SCHEDULE_BY_JOBORDER.* FROM SCHEDULE_BY_JOBORDER LEFT OUTER JOIN SCHEDULE ON SCHEDULE_BY_JOBORDER.SCHEDULE_ID = SCHEDULE.ID WHERE SCHEDULE.FREQUENCY_TYPE = '5' AND SCHEDULE_BY_JOBORDER.SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND SCHEDULE_BY_JOBORDER.UNIT_ID = ? ORDER BY SCHEDULE_BY_JOBORDER.EXPECTED_B_DATE DESC
reports.getTotalItem: select distinct item_id,item_name,sum(total) as total,sum(totalprice) as totalprice from temp_total_item GROUP BY item_id,item_name
reports.getTotalTitle: select distinct emp_title,title_name,sum(total) as total from temp_total_emptitle GROUP BY emp_title,title_name
reports.getParentBySort: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE IS_MAINTAINABLE = '0' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME asc
reports.getEqpbyParentSorting: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PARENT_ID = ? AND IS_DELETED = '0' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME,UNIT_NO asc
reports.getAllBasictypeBySorting: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit_type ORDER BY TYPE_NAME asc
reports.getAllBasicTypeBySortingByID: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit_type ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(ID) desc
reports.getBrandByBasictype: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE MAIN_TYPE_ID = ? AND IS_MAINTAINABLE = '0' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME asc
reports.getTasksbyParentSorting: SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE PARENT_UNIT = ? ORDER BY TASK_NAME,CODE asc
reports.getTasksByBasicTypeSorting: SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE MAIN_TYPE_ID = ? ORDER BY TASK_NAME,CODE asc
reports.getSitesBySort: SELECT * FROM project ORDER BY PROJECT_NAME asc
reports.getEqpBySitesSorting: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE SITE = ? AND IS_DELETED = '0' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME,UNIT_NO asc
reports.getEqpByAllSites: select maint.id ,maint.unit_name ,maint.parent_id,maint.unit_no ,main.type_name , maint2.unit_name brand_name , maint.site , proj.project_name from MAINTAINABLE_UNIT maint inner join MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE main on main.id=maint.main_type_id inner join MAINTAINABLE_UNIT maint2 on maint2.id= maint.parent_id inner join project proj on proj.project_id= maint.site order by project_id
reports.getEqpBySiteId: select maint.id ,maint.unit_name ,maint.parent_id,maint.unit_no ,main.type_name , maint2.unit_name brand_name , maint.site , proj.project_name from MAINTAINABLE_UNIT maint inner join MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE main on main.id=maint.main_type_id inner join MAINTAINABLE_UNIT maint2 on maint2.id= maint.parent_id inner join project proj on proj.project_id= maint.site WHERE maint.SITE = ?
reports.getProductLineBySort: SELECT * FROM production_line ORDER BY CODE asc
reports.getEqpByProLineSorting: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE PRODUCTION_LINE = ? AND IS_DELETED = '0' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME,UNIT_NO asc
reports.maintainableExsit: SELECT ID FROM maintainable_unit WHERE UNIT_NO = ? AND IS_MAINTAINABLE != 0 AND IS_DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID != 0
reports.getAllIEquipmentByDate: SELECT * FROM maintainable_unit WHERE SYS_DATE between ? and ?
reports.getCheckResponse: select * from transaction where JOB_ORDER_ID = ? and code = ? and (ST_TRANSACTION_CODE is not null and ST_TRANSACTION_NO is not null and ST_TRANSACTION_BRANCH is not null)
reports.getResponseTotalStoreItems: select sum(ITEM_QUANNTITY) as total,detail_id,ITEM_ID,JOB_ORDER_ID,cost_center_id from trans_store_item where JOB_ORDER_ID = ? and transaction_code = ? group by detail_id,item_id,JOB_ORDER_ID,cost_center_id
reports.getAllInfoBySparePart: select DISTINCT JOB_ORDER_ID,ITEM_CODE,item_quanntity,DEP_QTY1,Cost,trans_date from trans_info_item where ITEM_CODE=? and trans_date between ? and ?
reports.getTotalStoreItems: select sum(ITEM_QUANNTITY) as total from trans_store_item where JOB_ORDER_ID = ? and transaction_code = ? and ITEM_ID = ?
reports.getResultTotalStoreItems: select sum(DEP_QTY1) as total,ITEM_CODE,JOB_ORDER_ID from result_store_item where JOB_ORDER_ID = ? and transaction_code = ? group by item_code,JOB_ORDER_ID
reports.getBrandBySubName: select * from maintainable_unit where IS_MAINTAINABLE='0' and IS_DELETED ='0' and LOWER(UNIT_NAME) LIKE LOWER('%ppp%') ORDER BY UNIT_NAME
reports.getBrandBySubCode: select * from maintainable_unit where IS_MAINTAINABLE='0' and IS_DELETED ='0' and UNIT_NO LIKE '%ppp%' ORDER BY UNIT_NAME

UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.checkScheduleExist: select * from unit_schedule_history where UNIT_ID = ? and PERIODIC_ID = ?
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.viewSchedule: select * from unit_schedule_history where UNIT_ID = ? and PERIODIC_ID = ? and TO_NUMBER(RATE_NO) > TO_NUMBER(CANCEL_RATE_NO) and TO_NUMBER(RATE_NO) > TO_NUMBER(JOB_ORDER_RATE_NO)
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.selectAllSchduleCanView: SELECT * FROM unit_schedule_history WHERE UNIT_ID = ? and TO_NUMBER(RATE_NO) > TO_NUMBER(CANCEL_RATE_NO) and TO_NUMBER(RATE_NO) > TO_NUMBER(JOB_ORDER_RATE_NO)
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.updateScheduleExist: update unit_schedule_history set BEGIN_DATE = SYSDATE , END_DATE = SYSDATE , RATE_NO = ? where UNIT_ID = ? and PERIODIC_ID = ?
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.updateScheduleRateAndReading: update unit_schedule_history set JOB_ORDER_DATE = SYSDATE , RATE_NO = ? , JOB_ORDER_READING = ? where UNIT_ID = ? and PERIODIC_ID = ?
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.getScheduleRateId: select id from unit_schedule_history where UNIT_ID = ? and PERIODIC_ID = ?
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.updateJobOrderRate: update unit_schedule_history set JOB_ORDER_RATE_NO = RATE_NO where id = ?
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.updateCancelRate: update unit_schedule_history set CANCEL_RATE_NO = RATE_NO where id = ?
UnitScheduleHistoryMgr.getAllEquipmentsUnderSchedule: SELECT * FROM unit_schedule_history WHERE PERIODIC_ID = ? ORDER BY UNIT_NAME DESC

ItemFormListMgr.getStoreByBranch: SELECT DISTINCT STORE_CODE FROM ITEM_FORM_LIST WHERE BRANCH_CODE = ?

GrantsMgr.updateGrants: update grants set grant_name = ? ,grant_desc = ? where id=?

ReconfigTaskMgr.getActiveItemTask: select * from reconfig_task where issue_id=? and task_id=? and item_id=?

WorkPlaceMgr.updateWorkPlace: UPDATE work_place SET NAME = ? ,NOTE = ? WHERE ID = ?

TaskTypeMgr.updateTaskType: update task_type set name = ? ,descr = ? where id = ?

ActionTakenMgr.updateActionTakenByIssue: UPDATE ACTION_TAKEN SET ISSUE_ID = ? , ACTION_TYPE = 'JO' WHERE UNIT_SCHD_HIST_ID = ? AND READING_COUNTER = ?
ActionTakenMgr.updateActionTakenByCancel: UPDATE ACTION_TAKEN SET CANCEL_REASON = ? , ACTION_TYPE = 'CANCEL' WHERE UNIT_SCHD_HIST_ID = ? AND READING_COUNTER = ?
ActionTakenMgr.selectLastIssuesByAction: SELECT DISTINCT(ISSUE_ID) FROM ACTION_TAKEN WHERE ACTION_TYPE = 'JO' AND UNIT_ID = ? AND READING_COUNTER = ?

PriceQueryMgr.updatePrice: update quantified_mntence set ITEM_PRICE = ? , TOTAL_COST = ? * ITEM_QUANNTITY where id = ?
PriceQueryMgr.updatePriceConfig: update eqp_mntnc_type_config set ITEM_PRICE = ? , TOTAL_COST = ? * ITEM_QUANNTITY where id = ?

AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getallMaintenanceInfoByEquipAndTaskAndIt: select * from all_maintenance_info where unit_id = ? and task_id = ? and item_id = ? and issue_date between ? and ? and trade = ? xxx yyy order by to_number(issue_id)
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getByTypeSite: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,expected_b_date,expected_e_date,actual_begin_date,actual_end_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id from all_maintenance_info where main_type_id in (mmm) and site in (sss) and trade in (ttt) and issue_title iii1 like '%iii2' and current_status in (ccc) and actual_begin_date between ? and ? order by unit_id, date_order,to_number(issue_id),site

AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getTask: select CODE,task_name from tasks_by_issue where issue_id = ?
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getAllMaintenanceInfobyMaintNumForAnySch: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_ID,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,trade,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id,ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE,ACTUAL_END_DATE from ALL_MAINTENANCE_INFO WHERE to_number(BUSINESS_ID) between ? and ? order by to_number(issue_id),site
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getDetailsMaintenanceByMaintNum: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,expected_b_date,expected_e_date,actual_begin_date,actual_end_date,trade,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id, unit_id from all_maintenance_info where to_number(business_id) between ? and ? and (CURRENT_STATUS = 'Canceled' or CURRENT_STATUS = 'Assigned' or CURRENT_STATUS = 'Finished') order by unit_id, actual_begin_date, to_number(issue_id), site
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getByMainTypeAndDate: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id,expected_b_date,expected_e_date,actual_begin_date,actual_end_date,MAIN_TYPE_ID from all_maintenance_info where actual_begin_date between ? and ? and trade in (tradeParam) and current_status = ? and site in (sitesParam) and main_type_id in (mainTypeParam) order by unit_id
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getByUnitAndDate: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id,expected_b_date,expected_e_date,actual_begin_date,actual_end_date,MAIN_TYPE_ID from all_maintenance_info where actual_begin_date between ? and ? and trade in (tradeParam) and current_status = ? and site in (sitesParam) and unit_id = ? order by unit_id
