AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getByUnitAndDateAll: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id,expected_b_date,expected_e_date,actual_begin_date,actual_end_date,MAIN_TYPE_ID from all_maintenance_info where actual_begin_date between ? and ? and trade in (tradeParam) and site in (sitesParam) and unit_id = ? order by unit_id
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getAllMaintenanceByTaskAndModel: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,expected_b_date,expected_e_date,actual_begin_date,actual_end_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id,TYPE_OF_RATE,task_id from all_maintenance_info where parent_id in (ppp) and site in (sss) and issue_title iii1 like '%iii2' and current_status in (ccc) and actual_begin_date between ? and ? and task_id = ? and issue_date in ( select max (issue_date) from all_maintenance_info group by unit_id) order by unit_id,to_number(issue_id),site
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getAllMaintenanceByTaskAndEqp: select distinct issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,expected_b_date,expected_e_date,actual_begin_date,actual_end_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id,TYPE_OF_RATE,task_id from all_maintenance_info where unit_id = 'ppp' and site in (sss) and issue_title iii1 like '%iii2' and current_status in (ccc) and actual_begin_date between ? and ? and task_id = ? and issue_date in ( select max (issue_date) from all_maintenance_info group by unit_id) order by unit_id,to_number(issue_id),site
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByMainType:
select sum (ITEMS_TOTAL_COST) as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, sum(LABORS_TOTAL_COST) as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, sum(EXTERNAL_COST) as EXTERNAL_COST, TYPE_NAME, MAIN_TYPE_ID from (
SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_TYPE_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID
union all
SELECT 0 as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_TYPE_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID
union all
SELECT 0 as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS TYPE_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_TYPE_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID
)
group by TYPE_NAME, MAIN_TYPE_ID
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByDepartment: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID AS DEPARTMENT_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.DEPARTMENT = DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME,DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByBrand:
select sum (ITEMS_TOTAL_COST) as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, sum(LABORS_TOTAL_COST) as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, sum(EXTERNAL_COST) as EXTERNAL_COST, TYPE_NAME, PARENT_ID from (
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME FROM (
SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS PARENT_ID, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST
FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID
) ALL_DATA
INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
union all
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME
FROM (
SELECT 0 as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS PARENT_ID, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST
FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID
) ALL_DATA
INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
union all
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME
FROM (
SELECT 0 as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS PARENT_ID, NVL(SUM(NVL(ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST
FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID
) ALL_DATA
INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
)
group by TYPE_NAME, PARENT_ID
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByProductionLine: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, PRODUCTION_LINE.ID AS PRODUCTION_LINE_ID, PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE AS TYPE_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN PRODUCTION_LINE ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.PRODUCTION_LINE = PRODUCTION_LINE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE PRODUCTION_LINE.ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY PRODUCTION_LINE.ID,PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByUnit:
select sum (ITEMS_TOTAL_COST) as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, sum(LABORS_TOTAL_COST) as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, sum(EXTERNAL_COST) as EXTERNAL_COST, TYPE_NAME, UNIT_ID from (
SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID AS UNIT_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
union all
SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID AS UNIT_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
union all
SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID AS UNIT_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
)
group by TYPE_NAME, UNIT_ID
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByAllUnits:
select sum (ITEMS_TOTAL_COST) as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, sum(LABORS_TOTAL_COST) as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, sum(EXTERNAL_COST) as EXTERNAL_COST, TYPE_NAME, UNIT_ID from (
SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID AS UNIT_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' AND IS_DELETED = '0' ) GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
union all
SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID AS UNIT_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' AND IS_DELETED = '0' ) GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
union all
SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID AS UNIT_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS TYPE_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM MAINTAINABLE_UNIT WHERE IS_MAINTAINABLE = '1' AND IS_DELETED = '0' ) GROUP BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
)
group by TYPE_NAME, UNIT_ID
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByMainTypeAndUnits:
select sum (ITEMS_TOTAL_COST) as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, sum(LABORS_TOTAL_COST) as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, sum(EXTERNAL_COST) as EXTERNAL_COST, SUB_NAME, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_ID from (
SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS MAIN_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID
union all
SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS MAIN_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID
union all
SELECT 0 as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS MAIN_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID
)
group by SUB_NAME, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_ID ORDER BY MAIN_ID

select sum (ITEMS_TOTAL_COST) as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, sum(LABORS_TOTAL_COST) as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, sum(EXTERNAL_COST) as EXTERNAL_COST, SUB_NAME, PARENT_ID, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_ID from (
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM( SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS PARENT_ID, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS MAIN_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID ORDER BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID ) ALL_DATA INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
union all
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM( SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS PARENT_ID, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS MAIN_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID ORDER BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID ) ALL_DATA INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
union all
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM( SELECT 0 as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS PARENT_ID, NVL(SUM(NVL(ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS MAIN_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID ORDER BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID ) ALL_DATA INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
)
group by SUB_NAME, PARENT_ID, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_ID ORDER BY MAIN_ID
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByBrandAndUnits:
select sum (ITEMS_TOTAL_COST) as ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, sum(LABORS_TOTAL_COST) as LABORS_TOTAL_COST, sum(EXTERNAL_COST) as EXTERNAL_COST, SUB_NAME, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_ID from (
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS MAIN_NAME FROM( SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME ORDER BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME ) ALL_DATA INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.MAIN_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
union all
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS MAIN_NAME FROM( SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS EXTERNAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME ORDER BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME ) ALL_DATA INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.MAIN_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
union all
SELECT ALL_DATA.*, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS MAIN_NAME FROM( SELECT 0 AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, 0 AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.LABOR_COST,0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS MAIN_ID FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM
WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ACTUAL_BEGIN_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.SITE IN ( SSS ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME ORDER BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME ) ALL_DATA INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_DATA.MAIN_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID
)
group by SUB_NAME, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_ID ORDER BY MAIN_NAME
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportsByBrandAndMainTypes: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST , 0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID AS MAIN_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS SUB_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS MAIN_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID IN ( XXX ) GROUP BY ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME ORDER BY MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportByDepartmentAndUnits: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST , 0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS MAIN_NAME, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID AS MAIN_ID, ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.DEPARTMENT = DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME,DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID,ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_NAME
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportByDepartmentAndBrands: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(EMP_TASKS_HOURS.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST , 0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS MAIN_NAME, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID AS MAIN_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.PARENT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.DEPARTMENT = DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN EMP_TASKS_HOURS ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EMP_TASKS_HOURS.ISSUE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID IN ( XXX ) GROUP BY DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME,DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME ORDER BY DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportByDepartmentAndMainTypes: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(TASK_EXECUTION.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST , 0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS MAIN_NAME, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID AS MAIN_ID, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.DEPARTMENT = DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK_EXECUTION ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = TASK_EXECUTION.ISSUE_TASK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID IN ( XXX ) GROUP BY DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME,DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME ORDER BY DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportByProductionLineAndUnits: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(TASK_EXECUTION.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST , 0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, PRODUCTION_LINE.ID AS MAIN_ID, PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE AS MAIN_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN PRODUCTION_LINE ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.PRODUCTION_LINE = PRODUCTION_LINE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK_EXECUTION ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = TASK_EXECUTION.ISSUE_TASK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE PRODUCTION_LINE.ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY PRODUCTION_LINE.ID,PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME

AND ? GROUP BY PRODUCTION_LINE.ID,PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.UNIT_NAME
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportByProductionLineAndMainT: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(TASK_EXECUTION.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST , 0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, PRODUCTION_LINE.ID AS MAIN_ID, PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE AS MAIN_NAME, MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.MAIN_TYPE_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.ID INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN PRODUCTION_LINE ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.PRODUCTION_LINE = PRODUCTION_LINE.ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK_EXECUTION ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = TASK_EXECUTION.ISSUE_TASK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE PRODUCTION_LINE.ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? GROUP BY PRODUCTION_LINE.ID,PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE,MAINTAINABLE_UNIT_TYPE.TYPE_NAME
AllMaintenanceInfoMgr.getCostingReportByProductionLineAndDepar: SELECT SUM(NVL(ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS ITEMS_TOTAL_COST, --SUM(NVL(TASK_EXECUTION.TOTAL_COST,0)) AS LABORS_TOTAL_COST, NVL(SUM(NVL(EXTERNAL_JOB.LABOR_COST , 0)),0) AS EXTERNAL_COST, PRODUCTION_LINE.ID AS MAIN_ID, PRODUCTION_LINE.CODE AS MAIN_NAME, DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_NAME AS SUB_NAME FROM ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM INNER JOIN MAINTAINABLE_UNIT ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_ID = MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.ID INNER JOIN PRODUCTION_LINE ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.PRODUCTION_LINE = PRODUCTION_LINE.ID INNER JOIN DEPARTMENT ON MAINTAINABLE_UNIT.DEPARTMENT = DEPARTMENT.DEPARTMENT_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID = ITEM_WITH_AVG_PRICE.SCHEDULE_ID --LEFT OUTER JOIN TASK_EXECUTION ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = TASK_EXECUTION.ISSUE_TASK_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN EXTERNAL_JOB ON ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_ID = EXTERNAL_JOB.ISSUE_ID WHERE PRODUCTION_LINE.ID IN ( XXX ) AND ALL_MAINTENANCE_WITHOUT_ITEM.ISSUE_DATE BETWEEN ? AvgCost.getByTypeSiteWithoutTitleStatus: select distinct expected_e_date, actual_begin_date, actual_end_date,ISSUE_DESC, issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id from all_maintenance_info where main_type_id in (mmm) and site in (sss) and trade in (ttt) and issue_title iii1 like '%iii2' and current_status != 'Canceled' and actual_begin_date between ? and ? order by unit_id, date_order, to_number(issue_id),site
AvgCost.t1: select distinct expected_e_date, actual_begin_date, actual_end_date,ISSUE_DESC, issue_id,UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID,issue_title,site,site_name,issue_date,current_status,current_status_since,business_id,business_id_by_date,trade,unit_id,unit_no,unit_name,parent_id from all_maintenance_info where parent_id in (mmm) and site in (sss) and trade in (ttt) and issue_title iii1 like '%iii2' and current_status != 'Canceled' and actual_begin_date between ? and ? order by unit_id, date_order, to_number(issue_id),site

AvgCost.getItemsWithAvgPrice: select item_id,item_quanntity,item_price,total_cost,item_desc,branch from item_with_avg_price where SCHEDULE_ID = ? order by ITEM_ID,cost_center_id,ITEM_QUANNTITY
AvgCost.getItemsWithAvgPriceByCostCenter: select item_id,item_quanntity,item_price,total_cost,item_desc,branch from item_with_avg_price where SCHEDULE_ID = ? and ATTACHED_ON = ?

QuantifiedItemsDescMgr.getQuantifiedItemsDescBySubName: select * from quantified_items_desc where item_desc like '%ppp%' order by ITEM_DESC desc
QuantifiedItemsDescMgr.getItemDesc: select item_desc from quantified_items_desc where item_id = ?

EquipmentsWithReadingMgr.getEquipmentsWithReadingBySites: select * from equipments_with_reading where SITE in (xxx) and ENTRY_TIME BETWEEN ? AND ? and TYPE_OF_RATE in (yyy) order by to_number(ENTRY_TIME) desc
EquipmentsWithReadingMgr.getEquipmentsWithReadingByIds: select * from equipments_with_reading where UNIT_ID in (xxx) and ENTRY_TIME BETWEEN ? AND ? and TYPE_OF_RATE in (yyy) order by to_number(ENTRY_TIME) desc
EquipmentsWithReadingMgr.getEquipmentsByBrand: select * from equipments_with_reading where SITE in (sss) and type_of_rate in (ttt) and to_number(ENTRY_TIME) <= ? and PARENT_ID in (ppp) order by type_of_rate, to_number(ENTRY_TIME) desc
EquipmentsWithReadingMgr.getEquipmentsByMainType: select * from equipments_with_reading where SITE in (sss) and type_of_rate in (ttt) and to_number(ENTRY_TIME) <= ? and MAIN_TYPE_ID in (mmm) order by type_of_rate, to_number(ENTRY_TIME) desc
EquipmentsWithReadingMgr.getEquipmentsWithReadingByUnitIds: select * from equipments_with_reading where SITE in (sss) and type_of_rate in (ttt) and to_number(ENTRY_TIME) <= ? and UNIT_ID in (iii) order by type_of_rate, to_number(ENTRY_TIME) desc

InspectionMgr.updateLaborInspection: UPDATE LABOR_INSPECTION SET LABOR_ID_FLEVEL = ? , LABOR_ID_SLEVEL = ? WHERE INSPECTION_ID = ?
InspectionMgr.inspectionStatusInprogressExist: SELECT ID FROM INSPECTION_STATUS WHERE STATUS_NAME = 'InProgress' AND INSPECTION_ID = ?
InspectionMgr.inspectionStatusClosedExist: SELECT ID FROM INSPECTION_STATUS WHERE ( STATUS_NAME = 'ClosedAgree' OR STATUS_NAME = 'ClosedDisAgree' ) AND INSPECTION_ID = ?
InspectionMgr.updateInspectionAsInProgress: UPDATE INSPECTION SET CURRENT_STATUS = 'InProgress' WHERE ID = ?
InspectionMgr.updateInspectionAsClosedAgree: UPDATE INSPECTION SET CURRENT_STATUS = 'ClosedAgree' WHERE ID = ?
InspectionMgr.updateInspectionAsClosedDisAgree: UPDATE INSPECTION SET CURRENT_STATUS = 'ClosedDisAgree' WHERE ID = ?
InspectionMgr.selectAllInspectionsInitOrderedByCode: SELECT * FROM INSPECTION WHERE CURRENT_STATUS = 'Initial' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CODE) DESC
InspectionMgr.selectLastInspections: SELECT * FROM INSPECTION WHERE TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(INSPECTION_DATE , 'YYYYmmDDHH24MISS')) >= TO_NUMBER(?) AND CURRENT_STATUS = 'Initial' ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CODE) DESC
InspectionMgr.selectClosedInspection: SELECT * FROM INSPECTION WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND (CURRENT_STATUS = 'ClosedDisAgree' OR CURRENT_STATUS = 'ClosedAgree') AND INSPECTION_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CODE) DESC
InspectionMgr.selectIspectionsByDate: SELECT * FROM INSPECTION WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND INSPECTION_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CODE) DESC
InspectionMgr.selectIspectionByStatus: SELECT * FROM INSPECTION WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND CURRENT_STATUS = ? AND INSPECTION_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(CODE) DESC
InspectionMgr.selectSysDate: select to_char(sysdate ,'YYYYmmDDHH24MISS') as now from dual
InspectionMgr.foundJobOrder: SELECT ID FROM INSPECTION WHERE ID = ? AND ISSUE_ID is not null
InspectionMgr.foundComplaintsWithoutOption: SELECT ID FROM COMPLAINT_INSPECTION WHERE INSPECTION_ID = ? AND DESC_SLEVEL != 'UL'
InspectionMgr.foundComplaintsWithOpetionYes: SELECT ID FROM COMPLAINT_INSPECTION WHERE INSPECTION_ID = ? AND DESC_SLEVEL != 'UL' AND STATUS_SLEVEL = '1'
InspectionMgr.getInspectionComplaint: select * from COMPLAINT_INSPECTION where INSPECTION_ID = ? and STATUS_SLEVEL ='1'
InspectionMgr.maintainableExsit: SELECT ID FROM maintainable_unit WHERE UNIT_NO = ? AND IS_MAINTAINABLE != 0 AND IS_DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID != 0
InspectionMgr.updateInspectionByIssue: UPDATE INSPECTION SET ISSUE_ID = ? WHERE ID = ?
InspectionMgr.updateInspectionStatusInERP: update change_assets_location set MAINT_STATUS = ? where TRNS_NO = ? and BR_OLD_LOCATION = ?

EmpBasicMgr.getEmpViewByName: SELECT * FROM EMPVIEW WHERE EM_NAME_AR_OR_EN LIKE '%ppp%' AND EMPCODE NOT IN (SELECT EMP_NO FROM EMPLOYEE) ORDER BY EMPNAME
EmpBasicMgr.getEmpViewByCode: SELECT * FROM EMPVIEW WHERE EM_NAME_AR_OR_EN LIKE '%ppp%' AND EMPCODE NOT IN (SELECT EMP_NO FROM EMPLOYEE) ORDER BY EMPNAME
EmpBasicMgr.getAllEmpViewNotInEmployee: SELECT * FROM EMPVIEW WHERE EMPCODE NOT IN (SELECT EMP_NO FROM EMPLOYEE) ORDER BY EMPNAME

DatebaseControllerMgr.selectAllViews: SELECT OBJECT_NAME FROM ALL_OBJECTS WHERE OWNER = ? AND OBJECT_TYPE = 'VIEW' AND STATUS = ?
DatebaseControllerMgr.isSchemaFound: SELECT OWNER FROM ALL_OBJECTS WHERE OBJECT_TYPE = 'TABLE' AND OWNER = ? AND ROWNUM < 2

CostStoreItemsMgr.getCostItemIssue: SELECT SUM(TOTAL_COST) AS COST from COST_STORE_ITEM WHERE JOB_ORDER_ID = ?

ItemBalanceMgr.getBalance: SELECT Q1 FROM ITEM_BALANCE_AT_TIME WHERE STORE_CODE = ? AND ITEM_FORM = ? AND ITEM_CODE = ?

UserProjectsMgr.getAllProjectsByUserId: SELECT PROJECT_ID,PROJECT_NAME FROM user_projects WHERE USER_ID = ? ORDER BY PROJECT_NAME asc

EqpMoveHistoryMgr.updateEQPLocation: UPDATE MAINTAINABLE_UNIT SET SITE = ? WHERE ID = ?
EqpMoveHistoryMgr.updateHistoryEndDate: UPDATE EQP_MV_HISTORY SET END_DATE = ? WHERE ID = ?

LoggerMgr.selectAllLogs: SELECT l.*, u.FULL_NAME FROM LOGGER l LEFT JOIN USERS u on l.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE L.EVENT_TIME BETWEEN ? AND ?

ResultStoreItemMgr.isIssueHasResponse: SELECT TRANSACTION_NO FROM RESULT_STORE_ISSUE WHERE JOB_ORDER_ID = ?

ApplicationConfiguration.updateSystemImages: UPDATE SYSTEM_IMAGES SET IMAGE_DATA_ID = ? ,IMAGE_NAME = ? ,IMAGE_PATH = ? WHERE ID = ?

SparePartsMgr.getSparePartsBySubCodeOrName: SELECT * FROM (SELECT SPARE_PARTS.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ITEM_NAME) AS INDICES FROM SPARE_PARTS WHERE KIND = ? AND CODE = ? AND ITEM_FORM = ? AND ITEM_NAME LIKE '%nnn%' AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ccc%') WHERE INDICES BETWEEN ? AND ?
SparePartsMgr.getCountSparePartsBySubCodeOrName: SELECT COUNT(KIND) AS NUMBER_SPARE_PARTS FROM SPARE_PARTS WHERE KIND = ? AND CODE = ? AND ITEM_FORM = ? AND ITEM_NAME LIKE '%nnn%' AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ccc%'
SparePartsMgr.getSparePartsBySubCodeOrNameByNotInItemC: SELECT * FROM (SELECT SPARE_PARTS.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ITEM_NAME) AS INDICES FROM SPARE_PARTS WHERE KIND = ? AND CODE = ? AND ITEM_FORM = ? AND ITEM_NAME LIKE '%nnn%' AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ccc%' AND ITEMCODE_BY_ITEMFORM NOT IN (iii)) WHERE INDICES BETWEEN ? AND ?
SparePartsMgr.getCountSparePartsBySubCodeOrNameByNotIn: SELECT COUNT(KIND) AS NUMBER_SPARE_PARTS FROM SPARE_PARTS WHERE KIND = ? AND CODE = ? AND ITEM_FORM = ? AND ITEM_NAME LIKE '%nnn%' AND ITEM_CODE LIKE '%ccc%' AND ITEMCODE_BY_ITEMFORM NOT IN (iii)

issueCounterReadingMgr.exsitIssueReading: SELECT ID FROM ISSUE_COUNTER_READING WHERE ISSUE_ID = ?

ManagerMaintenanceByStore.getMaxExtTransNumber: select max(trns_no) as max_no from store_trns_m where trns_code =? and branch =?
ManagerMaintenanceByStore.saveTransactionInERP: insert into store_trns_m (trns_no, trns_code, trns_date, from_dst, from_code, to_dst, to_code, item_form, rem, branch, trns_stamp, bookno,PURCHASE_INVOICE_NO,TRNS_TYPE) values (?,?,TO_DATE(sysdate,'DD-MON-YYYY'),?,?,?,?,?,'From Maintenance Project',?,sysdate,0,?,?)
ManagerMaintenanceByStore.saveTransactionDetailsInERP: insert into store_trns_o (trns_code, trns_no, trns_date, item_code, qty1, qty2, qty3, unit_price, total_price, item_form, branch, serial_no, cost_center_o, basic_qty,car) values(?, ?, TO_DATE(sysdate,'DD-MON-YYYY'), ?, ?, 0, 0, 0, 0, ?, ?, ?, null, 1,?)
ManagerMaintenanceByStore.updateTransaction: update transaction set ST_TRANSACTION_CODE= ? , ST_TRANSACTION_NO = ? , ST_TRANSACTION_BRANCH =? where id=?

ERPDistNamesMgr.getDepartmentsByCodeFromERP: SELECT * FROM dist_names WHERE type = 6 AND type_code = ?
ERPDistNamesMgr.getStoresByCodeFromERP: SELECT * FROM dist_names WHERE type = 4 AND type_code = ?

ERPStorTrnsMgr.getTransTypeFromERP: SELECT TRNS_CODE, TRNS_DESC,TRNS_TYPE FROM STOR_TRNS where TRNS_CODE=?

SpecsOutTrnsMgr.updateSpec: UPDATE specs_out_trns SET trans_type = ?, request_type = ?, from_side = ?, to_side = ? WHERE id = ?
SpecsOutTrnsMgr.updateEquipmentWarranty: update supplier_equipment set PURCHASE_DATE=?, WARRANTY_CONTRACT=?,WRNTY_EXPIRE_DATE=? where EQUIPMENT_ID=?

ItemsBranchMgr.quantityForItem: SELECT * FROM ITEMS_BRANCH WHERE ITEM_FORM = ? AND ITEM_CODE = ? AND STORE_CODE LIKE 'BB%'

UsedSparePartsMgr.getUsedItemsQuantityForIssue: SELECT NVL(SUM(ITEM_QUANNTITY),0) AS USED FROM USED_SPARE_PARTS WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ?

ManufactoryMgr.updateManufactoryMgr: UPDATE MANUFACTORY SET AR_NAME = ?, EN_NAME = ?, COUNTRY = ?, ABBREVIATION_NAME = ?, REMARKS = ? WHERE ID = ?

ScheduleRelationMgr.updateScheduleRelations: UPDATE SCHEDULE_RELATIONS SET RELATED_SCHEDULE_ID = ?, RELATION_TYPE = ? WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ?
ScheduleRelationMgr.checkRelatedScheduleFound: select * from SCHEDULE_RELATIONS where SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND RELATED_SCHEDULE_ID = ?
ScheduleRelationMgr.checkRelationBetweenSchedulesFound: select * from SCHEDULE_RELATIONS where SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND RELATED_SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND RELATION_TYPE = ?
ScheduleRelationMgr.deleteRelatedSchedule: delete from SCHEDULE_RELATIONS where SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND RELATED_SCHEDULE_ID = ?
ScheduleRelationMgr.getRelationSides: SELECT * FROM SCHEDULE_RELATIONS WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND RELATED_SCHEDULE_ID = ? OR SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND RELATED_SCHEDULE_ID = ? AND RELATION_TYPE = ?

ExternalJobReportMgr.getExternalJOByModel: SELECT SUPPLIER_ID, ISSUE_ID, CONVERSION_DATE, LABOR_COST, MAINT_STATMENT, EXTERNAL_TYPE, SITE_ID, CURRENT_STATUS, CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE, UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID, JO_ACTUAL_E_DATE, JO_ACTUAL_B_DATE, JO_CODE, JO_CODE_BY_DATE, UNIT_ID, JO_EXPECTED_E_DATE, JO_EXPECTED_B_DATE, WORK_ORDER_TRADE, SUPPLIER_NAME, TRADE_NAME, UNIT_NAME, PARENT_ID FROM external_job_report WHERE PARENT_ID in (mmm) AND CONVERSION_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND CURRENT_STATUS in (ccc) and SITE_ID in (sss) order by UNIT_ID, date_order,to_number(ISSUE_ID),SITE_ID
ExternalJobReportMgr.getExternalJOByEquip: SELECT SUPPLIER_ID, ISSUE_ID, CONVERSION_DATE, LABOR_COST, MAINT_STATMENT, EXTERNAL_TYPE, SITE_ID, CURRENT_STATUS, CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE, UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID, JO_ACTUAL_E_DATE, JO_ACTUAL_B_DATE, JO_CODE, JO_CODE_BY_DATE, UNIT_ID, JO_EXPECTED_E_DATE, JO_EXPECTED_B_DATE, WORK_ORDER_TRADE, SUPPLIER_NAME, TRADE_NAME, UNIT_NAME, PARENT_ID FROM external_job_report WHERE UNIT_ID = ? AND CONVERSION_DATE BETWEEN ? AND ? AND CURRENT_STATUS in (ccc) and SITE_ID in (sss) order by UNIT_ID, date_order,to_number(ISSUE_ID),SITE_ID
ExternalJobReportMgr.getExternalJOBReportByMaintNum: SELECT SUPPLIER_ID, ISSUE_ID, CONVERSION_DATE, LABOR_COST, MAINT_STATMENT, EXTERNAL_TYPE, SITE_ID, CURRENT_STATUS, CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE, UNIT_SCHEDULE_ID, JO_ACTUAL_E_DATE, JO_ACTUAL_B_DATE, JO_CODE, JO_CODE_BY_DATE, UNIT_ID,JO_EXPECTED_E_DATE, JO_EXPECTED_B_DATE, WORK_ORDER_TRADE, SUPPLIER_NAME, TRADE_NAME, UNIT_NAME, PARENT_ID FROM external_job_report WHERE to_number(JO_CODE) between ? and ? and (CURRENT_STATUS = 'Canceled' or CURRENT_STATUS = 'Assigned' or CURRENT_STATUS = 'Finished') ORDER BY UNIT_ID, JO_ACTUAL_B_DATE,to_number(ISSUE_ID),SITE_ID

GenericApprovalStatusMgr.updateGennricApproval: update GENERIC_APPROVAL_STATUS SET STATUS=?,COMMENTS=? WHERE BUSSINESS_ID=?

ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByAllMainType: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByAllMainTypeAndSchedule: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.schid=? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByMainType: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.maintype =? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByMainTypeAndSchedule: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.maintype =? and t.schid=? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByAllMainTypeAndSite: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.site=? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByAllMainTypeAndSiteAndSch: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.schid=? and t.site=? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByMainTypeAndSite: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.maintype =? and t.site=? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByMainTypeAndSiteAndSchedu: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.maintype =? and t.schid=? and t.site=? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByUnit: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.unitid =? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid
ReadingByScheduleMgr.getReadingWorkByUnitAndSchedule: select t.schid,t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.site,max(t.business_id) as business_id from readingbyschedule t where t.unitid =? and t.schid=? group by t.maintype,t.unitid,t.unit_name,t.schid,t.site order by t.unitid,t.schid

SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByAllMainType: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByAllMainTypeAndSchedule: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.schid=? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByMainType: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.maintype =? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByMainTypeAndSchedule: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.maintype =? and t.schid=? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByAllMainTypeAndSite: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.site=? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByAllMainTypeAndSiteAndSchedul: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.schid=? and t.site=? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByMainTypeAndSite: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.maintype =? and t.site=? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByMainTypeAndSiteAndSchedule: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.maintype =? and t.schid=? and t.site=? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByUnit: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.unitid =? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid
SQLReadingUnitWithoutJob.getReadingByUnitAndSchedule: select * from READING_UNIT_WITHOUT_JOB t where t.unitid =? and t.schid=? and t.current_reading!=0 order by t.unitid,t.schid

ExternalSQL.getUnitPriceByTransAndBanch: select * from ( select o.branch,o.item_form,o.item_code,m.trns_stamp,o.trns_code,o.trns_no , isnull((o.item_cost/case when o.basic_qty=1 then o.qty1 when o.basic_qty=2 then o.qty2 else o.qty3 end) , 0 ) + 0 as unitprice from store_trns_m m , store_trns_o o , stor_trns s where m.branch=o.branch and m.trns_code=o.trns_code and m.trns_no=o.trns_no and m.trns_code=s.trns_code and s.PRICE_EFFECT=1 and m.to_dst=4 AND (s.TRNS_nature=1 or s.trns_nature=4 or (s.trns_nature = 0 and s.TRNS_TYPE=1)) and m.trns_stamp >= (select begin_period from sysdates ) union all select b.code,i.item_form,i.item_code,to_date('01-01-1990'),'0',0,i.i_purch_price from item_data i,branch b where not exists (select 1 from item_branch_purch_price where item_form=i.item_form and item_code=i.item_code and branch=b.code) union all select b.branch,b.item_form,b.item_code,to_date('01-01-1990'),'0',0,b.i_purch_price from item_branch_purch_price b ) trans where trns_stamp <= to_date('ccc','DD-MON-YYYY') and item_form=? and item_code=? order by trns_stamp desc

UserClientsMgr.upsertUserClientRelation: MERGE INTO user_clients t USING dual ON (t.user_id = ? AND t.client_id = ?) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET comments = ?, from_date = ?, relation_type = ? WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, user_id, client_id, comments, creation_time, created_by, from_date, relation_type, end_date) VALUES (?,?,?,?,SYSDATE,?,?,?,null)
UserClientsMgr.deleteUserClientRelation: update user_clients t set end_date=SYSDATE where t.user_id = ? AND t.client_id = ?

EmpRelationMgr.upsertEmpRelation: MERGE INTO emp_mgr t USING dual ON (t.mgr_id = ? AND t.emp_id = ?) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET comments = ? WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, mgr_id, emp_id, comments) VALUES (?,?,?,?)
EmpRelationMgr.findDepartmentByManager: SELECT PROJECT_ID FROM PROJECT INNER JOIN EMP_MGR ON PROJECT.OPTION_ONE = EMP_MGR.MGR_ID WHERE EMP_MGR.EMP_ID = ?

ClientComplaintsMgr.updateUserTicketsCount: UPDATE TOTAL_TICKETS SET total_tickets = total_tickets + 1 WHERE user_id = ?
ClientComplaintsMgr.updateGenericCount: UPDATE GENERIC_COUNT SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE ID = ?

WFTaskCommentsMgr.getAllTaskComments: SELECT * FROM (SELECT WF_TASK_COMMENTS.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY ID) AS INDICES FROM WF_TASK_COMMENTS WHERE BUSINESS_OBJ_ID = ? AND OBJECT_TYPE = ?) WHERE INDICES BETWEEN ? AND ?
WFTaskCommentsMgr.selectTaskCommentsNumber: SELECT count(*) AS TASK_COMMENTS_NUM FROM WF_TASK_COMMENTS WHERE BUSINESS_OBJ_ID = ? AND OBJECT_TYPE = ?
WFTaskCommentsMgr.insertClientRealEstateWifi: Insert into datebase.STORE_ALLCODES ( CODE, ANAME, ENAME, CASH_BEGIN_DEBIT, CASH_BEGIN_CREDIT, CHECK_BEGIN_DEBIT, CHECK_BEGIN_CREDIT, GROUPF_ID, DISCDEPEND, DISCOUNT, ISSTOPED, ISTAX, SALESTAX, CASHLIMIT, PERIOD_LIMIT, ISBALANCED, CREATEDATE, USERID, STORE_ALLCODES_ORIGINAL_ID, STORE_ALLCODES_ID_CRM, AVAILABLEFORRESERVATION, STOPPEDNOTES, STORAGE, STORAGEID, TAXNO, AREAID, CUSTTYPE, CUSTIDNO, TAXEXEMPTION, CUSTADDRESS, CUSTBUILDNO, FLOOR, TAXTYPE, CURRENCYID ) values (?,?,?,0,0,0,0,42,null,null,0,null,null,null,null,null,sysdate,1,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null)
WFTaskCommentsMgr.insertClientRealEstateWifiTel: Insert into datebase.store_sub_code_spec (STORE_ALLCODES_ID,ATTRIBUTE,VALUE,GROUP_BASIC_ID,ATTRIBUTEEN) select (select aa.STORE_ALLCODES_ID from datebase.STORE_ALLCODES aa where UPPER(aa.aname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(?) || '%' and aa.code = ?) ,'الموبايل',?,12,'الموبايل' from dual
WFTaskCommentsMgr.insertClientRealEstateWeb: Insert into datebase.RESERVED_UNITS (INSTITEMID, COMPOSITEID, INDATE, RESERVED_BY, ARESERVED_FOR, ERESERVED_FOR, ACTIVE, USERID, TODATE, CURRENCYID, DEPOSITVALUE, RESERVEBYDEPOSIT, REG_ID_FROMCRM, CAMPCODE, REP2, REP, CAMPRESOURCE, DIRECTOR, INSTPROGID ) select ?,null,sysdate,?,(select aa.STORE_ALLCODES_ID from datebase.STORE_ALLCODES aa where UPPER(aa.aname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(?) || '%' and aa.code = ?),null,'1',42,sysdate + 7,1,?,0,null,null,null,null,null,null,? from dual
WFTaskCommentsMgr.saveDataRealEstateWebAllCode: Insert into datebase.STORE_ALLCODES (CODE, ANAME, ENAME, CASH_BEGIN_DEBIT, CASH_BEGIN_CREDIT, CHECK_BEGIN_DEBIT, CHECK_BEGIN_CREDIT, GROUPF_ID, DISCDEPEND, DISCOUNT, ISSTOPED, ISTAX, SALESTAX, CASHLIMIT, PERIOD_LIMIT, ISBALANCED, CREATEDATE, USERID, STORE_ALLCODES_ORIGINAL_ID, STORE_ALLCODES_ID_CRM, AVAILABLEFORRESERVATION, STOPPEDNOTES, STORAGE, STORAGEID, TAXNO, AREAID, CUSTTYPE, CUSTIDNO, TAXEXEMPTION, CUSTADDRESS, CUSTBUILDNO, FLOOR, TAXTYPE, CURRENCYID) select ?, ?, ?, 0, 0, 0, 0, (select groupf_ID from datebase.groupf where codetype = 110), 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, sysdate, 1, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL from dual
WFTaskCommentsMgr.getClientCheck: SELECT CLIENT_CODE,CLIENT_NAME FROM datebase.clients_m WHERE CLIENT_TELEPHONE = ?
WFTaskCommentsMgr.getClientCheckWifi: select aa.code as CLIENT_CODE from datebase.store_sub_code_spec ss left join datebase.STORE_ALLCODES aa on ss.store_allcodes_id = aa.store_allcodes_id where value = ?
WFTaskCommentsMgr.updateClientProduct: update CLIENT_PROJECTS set PROJECT_ID=? ,PRODUCT_CATEGORY_ID=?,BUDGET=?,PERIOD=?,PAYMENT_SYSTEM=?,NOTE=?,PRODUCT_NAME=?,PRODUCT_CATEGORY_NAME=? where ID=?
WFTaskCommentsMgr.updateIssueStatus: UPDATE ISSUE_STATUS SET STATUS_NAME = '8', END_DATE = NULL WHERE STATUS_ID = ?
WFTaskCommentsMgr.getSalesManagerUsers: select * from USER_GROUP ug,users us where us.user_id=ug.user_id and ug.group_id=1363766204934

IssueByComplaintMgr.getComplaintsByDepartment: SELECT * FROM issue_by_complaint where entry_date between to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') and to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') order by department_id
IssueByComplaintMgr.getComplaintsByClientId: SELECT * FROM issue_by_complaint where CUSTOMER_ID = ? and call_type != 'internal' order by customer_name
IssueByComplaintMgr.getComplaintsByCustomer: SELECT * FROM issue_by_complaint where entry_date between to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') and to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') and department_id = ? and customer_name like '$%'
IssueByComplaintMgr.getComplaintsByCustomerAllDeps: SELECT * FROM issue_by_complaint where entry_date between to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') and to_char(to_date(?,'DD-MM-YY'),'DD-Mon-YY') and customer_name like '$%'

SQL.getPrivateCurrentStatus: select max(status_id) as status_id from issue_status where created_by=?
SQL.getPublicCurrentStatus: select max(status_id) as status_id from issue_status where created_by in (select user_id from users)
SQL.updateClientComplaint: update client_complaints set CURRENT_STATUS=? ,CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE=sysdate where id=?
SQL.updateClientComplaint2: update client_complaints set CURRENT_STATUS=? ,CURRENT_STATUS_SINCE=sysdate,current_owner_id=?,current_owner=? where id=?
SQL.getCompStatusByUser: select max(status_id) as status_id from issue_status where BUSINESS_OBJ_ID=? and OBJECT_TYPE='client_complaint'
select max(status_id) as status_id from issue_status where BUSINESS_OBJ_ID=? and OBJECT_TYPE='
SQL.getCompStatusByUser2: select max(status_id) as status_id from issue_status where BUSINESS_OBJ_ID=? and OBJECT_TYPE='Housing_Units' and end_date is null
SQL.updateStatusByUser: update issue_status set END_DATE=sysdate where STATUS_ID=?
SQL.getOriginalOwner: select min(sys_id) from distribution_list where CLIENT_COM_ID=?
SQL.getCurrentOwner: select MAX(sys_id) from distribution_list where CLIENT_COM_ID=?
SQL.getPrivilegeCodes: SELECT PREV_CODE FROM previliges WHERE type = ?

ProjectsByGroupMgr.getProjectByGroupList: SELECT PROJECT_ID FROM PROJECT_BY_GROUP WHERE group_id = ?

IssueDocumentMgr.getIssueDocumentImage: SELECT IMAGE FROM issue_document_data WHERE DOCUMENT_ID = ?
IssueDocumentMgr.getIssueDocumentType: SELECT DOCUMENT_ID,DOCUMENT_TITLE,UNIT_ID,DESCRIPTION,DOCUMENT_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOCUMENT_META_TYPE,DOCUMENT_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM issue_document WHERE BUSINESS_OBJ_ID = ? AND OBJECT_TYPE = ? AND CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE = ? AND DOCUMENT_ID = ?
IssueDocumentMgr.getIssueDocumentByObject: SELECT DOCUMENT_ID,DOCUMENT_TITLE,DESCRIPTION,DOCUMENT_DATE,CREATED_BY,CREATED_BY_NAME,DOCUMENT_META_TYPE,DOCUMENT_TYPE,CONFIG_ITEM_TYPE,CREATION_TIME FROM issue_document WHERE BUSINESS_OBJ_ID = ? AND OBJECT_TYPE = ?

UserGroupsConfig.getUserGroupConfig: select * from USER_GROUP_CONFIG where GROUP_ID = ? and USER_ID = ?
UserGroupsConfig.getAllUserGroupConfig: select UG.*, TG.GROUP_NAME from USER_GROUP_CONFIG UG left join TRACKER_GROUP TG on UG.GROUP_ID = TG.GROUP_ID where UG.USER_ID = ?

ExpenseItemMgr.updateExpenseItem: UPDATE EXPENSE_ITEM SET CODE = ?, DESC_AR = ?, DESC_EN = ?, TRANSACTION_TYPE = ?, INDRIVE_CALC = ?, CREATED_BY = ?, CREATION_TIME = SYSDATE, MEASURE_UNIT = ? ,EXPENSE_ITEM_ACCOUNT_TYPE=?,EXPENSE_ITEM_TYPE=?,CALC_TYPE=? WHERE ID = ?
